subject: I didn't expect this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| |
---
Peter, what happened here?

Two days ago, I reached out to this powerful community asking for support – and the initial response was _overwhelming_ _. _

We shot up toward our 500 Team James April Memberships goal. But then, out of nowhere it seems, donations came to a standstill – and now we're on the verge of falling short of our April goal by 230 donations.

I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I _refuse_ to let it get the best of me. I’m confident in the size and strength of this team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up this gap with only hours left to go. **

**Peter, I’m counting on you to be one of the 230 people I need to make a donation, so please: **[**Will you give any amount before 11:59 p.m. to help power my fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62581409/403930086/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1056-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFlMGNkOC1iM2U3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1hKlFm3axZcVCO0iqCzFX_Q_mSAPE5bpYToUo3Nc-8o=)

Peter, in a moment, **[_I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign to activate your April Team James Membership and power _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62581411/403930089/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1056-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFlMGNkOC1iM2U3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1hKlFm3axZcVCO0iqCzFX_Q_mSAPE5bpYToUo3Nc-8o=)****[_our fight for progress_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62581412/403930090/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1056-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFlMGNkOC1iM2U3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1hKlFm3axZcVCO0iqCzFX_Q_mSAPE5bpYToUo3Nc-8o=)** , but first, I want to explain why this work is so personal to me.
Growing up, I didn't have power or privilege. I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for generations from preying on families like my own.
When I made history and became the first Black woman elected New York attorney general, I vowed to never let another New Yorker feel as powerless and voiceless as I once did – and thanks to your partnership, I have been able to do just that. So, I have to ask:

clean_body: | | Peter, what happened here? Two days ago, I reached out to this powerful community asking for support – and the initial response was overwhelming . We shot up toward our 500 Team James April Memberships goal. But then, out of nowhere it seems, donations came to a standstill – and now we're on the verge of falling short of our April goal by 230 donations. I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I refuse to let it get the best of me. I’m confident in the size and strength of this team – and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up this gap with only hours left to go. Peter, I’m counting on you to be one of the 230 people I need to make a donation, so please: = | | = Thank you. Letitia \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Letitia James Date: Fri, Apr 28, 2023 Subject: Why this fight is personal to me | | | Peter, in a moment, = , but first, I want to explain why this work is so personal to me. Growing up, I didn't have power or privilege. I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for generations from preying on families like my own. When I made history and became the first Black woman elected New York attorney general, I vowed to never let another New Yorker feel as powerless and voiceless as I once did – and thanks to your partnership, I have been able to do just that. So, I have to ask: = = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = So far, 2023 has been devastating for millions of Americans. Our nation has suffered through more than 170 mass shootings in the last four months – several of which were in schools. People in Florida lost access to abortions after six weeks, before many people even know they're pregnant. Peter, it's clear: Our work has NEVER been more important. That's why I'm committed to winning our fight for progress, safety, and equality at any cost, and I'm counting on you to join me. That's why I need 500 fearless fighters to activate their April Team James Memberships and join my fight before the month ends, but it looks like your membership is still inactive. = | | = Thank you for being in this fight alongside me. Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

The investment of our grassroots supporters helps us to build winning campaigns, strengthen on-the-ground efforts in the states, and mobilize voters. This work is a vital part of our strategy to defend state legislatures against a right-wing takeover.
**But if we don’t hit tonight’s goal, we won’t be able to ramp up our efforts, and state Republicans could head into May with a competitive edge. And, with high-stakes special elections over the next month, meeting our April deadline is critical.**

clean_body: This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline. | | | | | This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline. But first, here’s where things stand: There are FOUR HOURS left until our April end-of-month deadline. But we’re still $12,000 short of our critical goal. And based on our projections, we need strong grassroots Democrats in your area to help us close this gap. The moment that we announced our TRIPLE-MATCH offer, something incredible happened: Democrats took this opportunity to make their voices heard, loud and clear – they’re pouring in gifts to support our movement and defeat state Republicans: So we’re counting on you to help us keep this momentum going until the clock strikes midnight. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | I know it feels like we have a long way to go – but I’ve seen time and time again just how much this grassroots movement can accomplish when we stand strong and united. I know we can do this. All we need is you. The investment of our grassroots supporters helps us to build winning campaigns, strengthen on-the-ground efforts in the states, and mobilize voters. This work is a vital part of our strategy to defend state legislatures against a right-wing takeover. But if we don’t hit tonight’s goal, we won’t be able to ramp up our efforts, and state Republicans could head into May with a competitive edge. And, with high-stakes special elections over the next month, meeting our April deadline is critical.** Thanks for standing with us, Jose Cornejo VP Mobilization, DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: fwd:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
Hi friend, I wanted to follow up on my team's message from yesterday.
We're closing in on our deadline but still haven't made our April fundraising goal. Is there any way you can chip in with a donation to help us out?
When I ask you to donate, I want you to know that it's about more than just numbers on a spreadsheet. I'm asking you to invest in our campaign and support our work to ensure better representation for our district.
For far too long, our current senator has sold our community out for the favor of MAGA Republicans, and that's simply unacceptable friend.
I'm running because I believe you deserve better.
If you're with me, please consider donating to our campaign so we can win on June 20th. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.30.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Thank you for all you do,
Lashrecse
--Begin Forwarded Message--
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.30.2023_LA_all&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.30.2023_LA_all&amount=5]
Hi friend,
Lashrecse asked us to reach out and provide you with an update on our end-of-month fundraising deadline.
Thankfully supporters like you from across our Commonwealth are responding big-time. The donations are coming in fast, which is deeply encouraging.
However, we still need to raise $2,000 online by tomorrow night if we're going to hit our fundraising goal. Can you rush a donation to help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.29.2023_LA_all&amount=5]
This is not just about meeting a goal, friend.
Over the next few weeks, our campaign must pay for essential expenses to keep our ads on the air, deliver new mail pieces, and ensure our volunteers are well-equipped as we head into early voting.
Missing any goal at such a critical moment will create setbacks we simply can't afford.
If you're in a position to give, please consider heading to our ActBlue page right now to help us bridge this fundraising gap. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.29.2023_LA_all&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.29.2023_LA_all&amount=5]
Thank you!
Team Lashrecse
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

body:
Meeting tonight’s goal will allow us to build a strong foundation for what’s to come.

| Hi Peter,

I know me and my team have been emailing a lot lately, so I’ll keep this short.

Our first monthly deadline since launching our campaign is tonight, and we’re running out of time to meet our $2,500 fundraising goal. [_**If you’re able to, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution tonight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62581711/403937218/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230430-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmMwOTBjNGQtYjZlNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ADRB4u7sl14Gx87LFpPxlSC4wDRLeGejVCIaG_mSUdc=)

[_**Peter, will you make a contribution before the night is over to help us reach our goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62581712/403937219/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230430-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmMwOTBjNGQtYjZlNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ADRB4u7sl14Gx87LFpPxlSC4wDRLeGejVCIaG_mSUdc=)

Kurt

clean_body: | Derek, Today and everyday, Virginia Democrats are fighting to elect progressive, Democratic champions who will protect our progress and are ready to make our Commonwealth into the best version it can be. We’re laser focused on the General Assembly elections in November. There may be nothing more important in the nation than protecting abortion rights in Virginia. Our Commonwealth is one of the last states where someone can get a safe and legal abortion in the southern United States. Protecting our abortion rights is paramount this year. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We know that the GOP are gearing up to ban abortion in Virginia. They aren't trying to lie about their positions on the subject anymore, they’re saying the quiet part out loud now. = Help us stay in the fight to protect abortion rights! Look, I know my team and I have been in touch a lot over the past few days, so I’ll keep this brief — but I need to make sure you understand just how dire this situation is.

Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP are actively trying to strip millions of Black Americans of their healthcare access. This is far from the first time McCarthy has gone out of his way to hurt Black communities, **and it surely won’t be the last.**

[In times like these, our work to elect Black progressive champions is more critical than ever, and if we don’t take a stand now, it will only get worse from here. So please, Peter, chip in $10 or any amount you can possibly give before tonight at midnight:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oXtxrpByOksal4o4-OGwKQVtXxEBvshBx2z3yRMu0Z1b-JO6H0WFJf44Epoq7AsUW-1HicTfmHfH8D5H_GWxttcSr9o1vfpjOR5jbW4-8ox66nju1X-jPVtT9Hgty5jP8Jwc347mLCD7_JMRC520iaK4E_QIgn74U2F8AQwiffRWOVv0z22Gg2fx9sodf2QY96Ayim3i_NvwZctJGM5HeYuJusjV0gB0JSaiK3QSsO3HRzfzN-9uijA9xD6HhtcF3jQeFzDT_TFkyuMweSkF_QqrU6zreeGqlOXx7j4HNgm_TI94WAMV74GZzYwSzzuR_vw0uaw2u7PPYS_vIBE9UZ_Eac-hwOfcWVKXWZpYuiw7dtqH3eE3y1rW1DvrYf-L2j2RKvfpXfJVaFtFewnAh2xfmZwd_G8uyqK8VhN6WPYE8aymWzgh3911Jdn527zyO8XLMFTtLTNVgfhxjHk4NGAcIa0PiN11_gGoDxWKuun4/3vt/8XH6apycS7-zbd6XnmUNHA/h2/emMupmc_FhXvP2FAd0c0m0RiFJUSCE6sVHTZv2W8sgo) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hey Peter, it’s Quentin. Look, I know my team and I have been in touch a lot over the past few days, so I’ll keep this brief — but I need to make sure you understand just how dire this situation is. Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP are actively trying to strip millions of Black Americans of their healthcare access. This is far from the first time McCarthy has gone out of his way to hurt Black communities, and it surely won’t be the last. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thanks, team. As always, I couldn’t be more grateful for your endless commitment to building Black political power. Quentin James President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: our April end-of-month goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re less than $1,500 away from hitting our April goal.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas.
My team and I just hopped off our final end-of-month fundraising call and I wanted to let you know that we’re less than $1,500 away from hitting our April goal.
I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you in times like these. **But since it’s a Sunday and not everyone is checking their email, I need anyone reading this to help us close the gap.[So Peter, can you rush $10 or anything at all to our campaign before midnight?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31924?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31925?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31925?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31925?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31925?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31925?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31925?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31924?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK)
---
When we stay on track with these monthly goals, our campaign has the ability to plan ahead for things like scaling up our campaign operation, opening offices, getting our message in front of voters, and so much more.
**That’s why your support _right now_ is so critical, Peter.** Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your early contribution helps us build the foundation for a winning grassroots campaign.
**[So please, can you rush a donation of absolutely any amount toward our April goal before midnight tonight? I don’t take a penny from corporate PACs or corrupt mega-donors, so I mean it when I say your support is the only way we’ll be able to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31924?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK)**
**[RUSH A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31924?refcode=em20230430-3061&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3061%2E614464%2ENI8IJK)**
Thanks for everything,
— Lucas Kunce

I don’t want you to give up now. | | Thank you, Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Peter, when Republicans took the House Majority last November, we immediately fretted about the worst-case scenario.

**Now, that worst-case scenario is here** – just months into their term. Republicans are threatening massive cuts to critical social net programs, working families, teachers, veterans and more.

**They want to decimate the middle class while giving tax breaks to the rich.** They’ve stopped even pretending to care about everyday Americans.

**But Democrats aren’t sitting on the sidelines.** I’m proud to be leading multiple fights against the extremist Republicans derailing our nation. I stood up against the anti-trans sports ban, I’m speaking up against cuts to veteran programs everyday, and**I won’t stop – ever.**

Peter, with your help, we can defeat the MAGA Republicans and take back our majority. But that means consistent support from grassroots supporters like you.

[**Peter, can you rush $7 toward my April Fundraising goal that elapses at midnight? clean_body: I know it's a Sunday, so I'll keep this short! Hi Peter — I know it's a Sunday, so I promise to keep this short! Folks are rightfully fired up after the GOP released their sham budget proposal. But as Derek likes to say: Don't agonize,organize! Our team is ready to take back the People's House in 2024, and we're so close to reaching our April end-of-month goal. That's why I'm reaching out: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar you chip in will help power Derek's campaign to victory while helping lift up vulnerable Democrats in the House. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Donald J. Trump, me (2)** Date: Sat, Apr 29, 2023 Subject: FW: FIRST head-to-head deadline To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
Friend,
Sunday’s end-of-month deadline is no doubt our campaign’s biggest test to date.
After we close the books on April, our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head against Biden’s for the FIRST TIME of the election.

clean_body: There’s still time to CRUSH Biden at the first head-to-head deadline. | | Friend, this is it... ...Our biggest test of the 2024 campaign to date, and our first chance to send a clear message to Crooked Joe Biden and the radical Democrats that his presidency has officially begun its END. At 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT, our team will have to close the books on the month of April.And after that, there are no second chances. Which is why we simply had to ask one last time at the final hour: Will YOU answer President Trump’s call and help us OUTRAISE Biden at the FIRST end-of-month deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head? | | Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump, me (2) Date: Sat, Apr 29, 2023 Subject: FW: FIRST head-to-head deadline To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Friend, Sunday’s end-of-month deadline is no doubt our campaign’s biggest test to date. After we close the books on April, our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head against Biden’s for the FIRST TIME of the election. And while all of Biden’s globalist special interest donors will be chomping at the bit to see if their massive checks gave him the edge, the only thing I’ll be looking at is just how many patriots joined our movement to FIRE Biden . Because as I’ve always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the amount our supporters give, but by the sheer number of patriots among our ranks. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From:Donald J. Trump Date: Tue, Apr 25, 2023 Subject: OUTRAISE BIDEN To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, Make no mistake, billions and billions of dollars will be spent by the Democrats to try and stop us from winning back the White House in 2024. And following Biden’s announcement, we have just DAYS left until the end-of-month deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head for the FIRST TIME. But while Biden relies on Hollywood, the Soros Money Machine, and special interest donors to line his coffers, our campaign has something he NEVER will... ...An entire movement of grassroots patriots like YOU with an unwavering resolve to SAVE our country. No matter how much they spend, no matter how many vicious attacks they throw our way, with YOUR sustained support, we will counter them at every turn. | The fact that the Left has to spend billions of dollars to even compete with our MAGA movement should tell you everything you need to know about Joe Biden and today’s Democrat Party. How else would they sell a radical agenda that puts YOU – the American people – DEAD LAST? But even the mountains of cash that they haul in from globalist special interests won’t be enough to stop our incredible movement... ...Because patriots like YOU will help us spread the TRUTH that America's choice in 2024 couldn't be any more obvious. Do you want a country that secures OUR borders, or one that secures other nation’s borders? Do you want a country that prioritizes LAW-ABIDING citizens, or one that prioritizes criminals? Do you want a country that seeks TRUE JUSTICE for all, or one that weaponizes its justice system to criminalize dissent and imprison political opposition? Do you want a country that is STRONG, or one that apologizes and bends a knee to the globalist regime? Do you want a country that is PROUD of how far it has come, or one that tries to ERASE its own history? The choice is clear, but to ensure every last voter knows exactly what’s at stake in 2024, we MUST outraise Biden and the Democrats at each and every deadline. Thank you, | Donald J. | | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06ec623b-a040-4b02-9ba8-003ffc07c80a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Thank you, and best wishes to you and your family!

body:
Just wanted to give you a quick update on where we’re at.
---
| | | | | | | | |
---
| | friend - I just received an update from my team and they said we're a few dollars shy of our $10K goal. I wouldn't be reaching out to you if this wasn't such an important issue, but it is. The Dems will do everything in their power to push woke prosecutors to victory, meaning Virginians will be forced to go back to the criminal-first, victim-last policies of the previous administration. We've extended the deadline for the **[Stop the Dems Fund](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=4846f77e83122f3453706c360512885827c6c844f61e07903e284451b8b9ecd8ff6ae203e344e3d165bd6f8bbc4604392f7373a094562bbd "Stop the Dems Fund")** to give every Virginian one more chance to chip in. **[Please consider donating $5, $10, $15, or whatever you can afford.](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=4846f77e83122f34f60e7a4a825958e6e492fb3ce30f59fc4197c93538037f25251cd5b157e25b8a3dd90e4354b54adc636c0730c1a8f2bf "Please consider donating $5, $10, $15, or whatever you can afford.")** The Commonwealth's future is at stake and it takes every single one of us to fight for her. **Donate:[https://secure.winred.com/miyares-for-virginia/action](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=4846f77e83122f34340ea852602422158d7fc98b9749844d76b9d8bdb8b96a5894cbc12f7259854421efca62e5bde0d5f91acc28942c17bd "https://secure.winred.com/miyares-for-virginia/action")** Thank you for helping me in this crucial fight. Jason

Trump Takes On DeSantis in Iowa, Epstein Private Calendar Reveals Names, Ranking Airlines

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# Monday, May 1, 2023

**Good morning!** Today we’re covering Donald Trump’s plan to intercept DeSantis in Iowa, Jeffrey Epstein’s newly revealed calendar of meetings with prominent officials, and a new ranking of the best and worst US airlines. ## Trump Takes on DeSantis in Iowa
Former President Donald Trump plans to [show up in Iowa](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0Ltu7CAQgOGnwR0rGIwvBcVp3O1pU1qzZmxPxE2G7GrfPkrq1H_xS9_Hfb0jB07Hf4zk2p5X3Bo_aVVWKi3BrNB5txMBmY6cHiaYew3KdKdDa_009LO13mx26q0eHjRs02QegyaDHTtQYJRVWiulYbztpt9hHMZ5wsc-Wit6RZ5bvm6fmVM7aQ_v_KTrtuXYBXe2Vqow_wQsApZ20skh_DQBy5kjJXpVAcuGsSAfScBi5kmZeZTt-opFloApcTok5xdKLIXwwrSRzElWjCQ9viVW6alialzlkyu3KmvDRgKW7nK-vDgErsMoenVE5N9_1_6m-g4AAP__mIlrRQ) for a rally on the same weekend that his rival, Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis, will be attending fund-raisers in the state. Trump's campaign says the trip has been planned for week, but it's viewed as a sign of the [intensifying competition](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OszAQAJ8GOkfr9V8oXHxNunztlcjg3WRPBiPwBd3bn3L1laNpRvNxH-9JiqyP_2mh2LiOaW7yohGcAq3QjNjnyERIpqeo_RUHqxFM_4yUjQtsExOzN9kB4nWa2AT2A2iXeokIaMCB1gAaw4WNZQw-DNc0cXCus0BZWt0vn1XW9iQu3_VF-2WuS1_is7Xt6My_Dm8d3tK20nm81Rv2JnOhDm9t_1o2lelIa5NDST2TokJzk7oqBLRKg81Es0c_TDlla4Im6-dpYnIOg-v3mLdTSpHDh87CY0lSfhPa30d-AgAA__-iQWCc) between the two leading contenders for the Republican nomination for president. Trump leads DeSantis by a large margin in polling nationally, and the first poll in Iowa covering all six Republican candidates shows the former [President leading DeSantis](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQhX8N3oiOA0MYGLp4S9eOFg1HfBUGy6aJ8u-rtGuX94YnPX36Pi7zJXLhenuPK4We2xyvne80wyhBSdQzDilkIiQ9UFD2jN4oBD0sIWlnTPIAMSuPxo7W-9EqMNq75MkOHBBQwwhKASh0p6xNRmedP8fP7MZRGKDEve2nr8a1L5TLs91pP13bOpSw9L4dQr8JnARO9bm1o78mgdPrWOAE5hVW4JRajSXJvn-vmywU0yH3VmWiI9bOh-QquT2iXCgm2dtfb60UgdOwh7Q9uBQ-rBMGbmvk8svQ_1fyEwAA__9JaF_U) there as well, 41% to 26%.
## Epstein Private Calendar Reveals Top Officials
Jeffrey Epstein's [newly revealed private calendar](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuhDAMgOGngS3IGLjAkKEL23XtiEziHK5CgkgE7dtX7dz5X359H8_lSRIkvt5pZ1N8WsgWuXiBQUGrsFuwdsYzI3c1m_Yx4tS3CF29mRVGJGtBa22n1a0anLMIPI52GNduqsUgYAcDtC1Ai7rxXe9RP_Q00ur1MFQ9sJOSzuYzSSwb-_CdLj4bm_Y6mK2UI1fdW4VzhfN9341PX5Hv_NsrnI8UpIjNFc585MISszpOuaiwshQ4OjrVyRdTyOoIFCM7tTMXia-s0ko7KXK7RJW8FysUlBVSdhP29WnccUsIkh-66uG1k4S_r_I_008AAAD__7AWbM4) showed scheduled meetings with a number of prominent people, including now-CIA Director William Burns, noted professor Noam Chomsky, as well as a college president and an Obama administration official, among others. According to [news reports](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAYBOCnwRsW_GCwB4Yu3tK1o0XhJ6bFEAGJlbev0qVLtzvphk_3cdkuNqaYr-_2QNND2azr8YEbmyjjFMQGgzcBEVAMaLiaYZEcmBh2I90888lzzq2CSTqvtJ41BlRhcejFEA0wEGxinDPGQY9ByABa6WW2n0FPE5EMfeyljl8l5r5jSM_ywDq6cgzJ7L3fGhFvBFYC63meYy3phW29ZHyNCKzunvq94l-iGc_2qtFSHyu6XirNxR7U7eVo30-Kt9YxZupswuxtpRyE1KDEIgisQzX-dsaUYlOaSHY9bEy_ov7_QT8BAAD__zAYZ9A), the meetings in the diary were arranged after Epstein served jail time in 2008 for a sex crime. The contents of the diary have not been shared publicly before. The purpose of the meetings isn't included in the documents, and those named said they met with Epstein [because he was wealthy and connected,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FyhCAQgOGnwQ5nWUG0oEhjd2lTOhtZDhKQG2XOubfPJHXqv_jn-7itN0o57fd3KuxaqCttLT15BSNBSRxW7LwLzMhDx06NE85aIQxddCMA-jFMFubZA5FmtJNCAkTD2lCXHAIOYEApAIW2D4MOaEc7T_QZrDFCA_vU6tF_1bS3yCG_6pOPfqulyy629jjF8CZwEbhc19W_KNb6WwUuO1-nwGVLJH06eGv1kHulIrdYy_n9kjsV9lIZbfVsRtXHVnJ3OP-4Us7pHK3QcC-U8t-u_a__CQAA__-V61oN) and not for potential liaisons.
## 300+ UFO Cases Still Unexplained, US Says
The U.S. government is currently tracking more than [650 potential UFO cases,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOrCAUxvGnwU4DRxAtKG5DN7fd0iAcxrNBMMqMu2-_ceut_8nvS76Px_xwlCg__7sNTY1ldr7SG2euWi5a6GdogomIgH2DRgwjTFIA75vVCIQRdVQqxmHxPvgpeKUdLF6GMC5TQwY49FxxITgXoLvYywh60NPolqiVYpJjoFqO7rNQrivG9F3eeHS-bE0ya637yfp_DCwDe11X53O-GwN7ywwslwysmBjYvSSq5E8G9nW2z5vJG-bavmJpD9zLUe9GOeBXt9YtNYcJ-0Up0TloJvlzc5R-l-vfR_wEAAD__36lXt0) officials tell Congress, and while none yet provide any evidence of aliens, at least half remain unexplained. The Pentagon's All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office, tasked with investigating UFOs, has even released a video of one still-unexplained "anomaly." ([Watch it here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQgOGnsbeg8xljZ_DQDgyV0rXdEIS74MrEEVxi5e2rds78S7_0fZ2G05hyul4-x5WicBnGs6QHDeAOYA5oB9RzZCIkqymaLuCxNQhWLxHJMHBgP3vnAiP6EBCdnV3oeOpQp4iAFhwYA2DQN2xbRt_5Yxgn9s6pFmhOUrbmp6SrLMT5WR60Neey6hwXkduu7JvCXmFfa22e5S73if66wn5fyia7wv4DbKUq3--u1VucbzXlnPbOqxYu65jy_09e834DAAD__1CAT6c)) Official interest in UFOs has grown since Congress passed a law last year protecting UFO whistle-blowers in the government. A half-dozen sources have since come forward with claims that they worked on [government UFO programs.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGu1SAYAOCnoRsN_LSFDh1MTrqYq4O5cWw49Kf9lUIDePG8vYtx8g2-fN_ftjdLgeLxxV64VJ826yp94CZGLiQHtUG3Lx4RUHW4yMnAPEgQqjuXp3Xj5BGkcbsBMzu7P_VojBvRKeN1RwsIUGIUUgohQfdeDR70pGdjn16PIxsE7lRT7n8kivVEH17pA3Pv0tWF5az1Lkx9YrAyWFtr_W4pvC5LoXep__WTwRqxFQarzZVcQC7lPE9aKwbrN_rN20mlBnyG1DAXXm4Kgb-vX3lBl7EW7lI8MpbSn_UKTK2xbJc7bYwYmHrkUhhMsWzOXrelIzL1kMMsGExUE1OPkhzZwGujWjFv_3jvn7u87HejEKhMmg3i-Ku-uvr_5j8BAAD__2PhgN8)
➤ **Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez** says she has no plans to run for US Senate in 2024, easing fears among Democrats that she might try to topple NY Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand from the left. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQAL8Gd1jLgo0pKK6hy7VXWgQvyZ4IWDYX6_7-Ka9-_Ugzmj-39Ra5cH38ji_yPbc1ps5vWmGSoCTqFYfNZyIkPZBX84LOKAQ9PL2-bw5Sml1cjLFLVvfoUpwn67ImxDSwR0ANEygFoNCOWZuMdrZuifdsp0kYoI17O8a_jWt_Ui7_25uOMbXXUPyz9_0U-pfAIDBc1zXurXDn1D6AwFDpOgWGj0VgACMwaBAYYkuST1lbl3uJtXJ9yN7k8a_K3A55Uo2dJFeJgEYCgDNmMsPht_3iUvicrTDweEUu3yn95zNfAQAA___Ch2Fq)) ➤ **The North Carolina Supreme Court** reverses itself and reinstates voter ID laws as well as keeping a GOP-led redistricting map in place. The decision to reverse come after the Court switched from Democrat majority to Republican majority in the last election. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyqzAQheGngW4ZaZGQXVDchs63TcmsYbHXEYiRBBq_fcap03_FOf_XbbyReNke_2nlPi9hpCnLyaOyoDRgO2I99wszcltzr7sLXo1G1dbPXuvFMDnLxjqLztxxbjui2XSTvRpNtfSosFVWaa2URtcsrVnQde56ofvirK2M4llyiM0ryJafvPh3ODk2U1hr3z9z3lPV_qtwqHAopTQziX8XifwRFQ4bl1ThsB9x9wwpU2ZIxx55ZZjCETOs9M0JVnqFCPH4PIWwAXuesoQNZMv8iJLf4KlA5JNj-pg98inhSDDzJEnCVsd-3ot4L6lzlVGPlcT_7sx_Z_sJAAD__2TScyg)) ➤ **A proposed bill** would hike California teacher salaries rise by 50% over the the next 7 years. Though it's unclear how the state would afford it, the proposed bill would create new funding targets for local districts in an effort to attract more and better teachers. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGvozAQBOBfY7pFZjGYFBTX0OXaK9Fir8OeTBzZviD-_Smve9KrZ6RvNH_u650kyvPxmw6ea0gruSpvXvUAugPsV2z8HJiR-4bnbpzwZjrUfbPPFunmPYaOJ9Ob0elttJt11lnyI6FpZEaNvR5012ndoW1DbwLa0d4m2oIdBmU0e6kpt3-TPOvOIV7pzbl16WjivNf6Kqr_pXBRuJzn2UaqcnD55AoXR1FCyk8hhUupKV8Klw8J2gBO3xqwSYxwpn_Rw5ZSqVCZ3M4ZCkXKwgW2CwYNHx8sXEy5NHn2r1NilDJaZfTjIIlf4-rPX_0PAAD__xqqavA))
➤ **Colorado Coach Deion Sanders** tweets that he's "ashamed" of the NFL for choosing only one player, Isaiah Bolden, from an HBCU (Historically Black College and University) in this year's draft. Bolden is a cornerback from Jackson State, an HBCU where Sanders had previously coached. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwQ5n3VXRwiIN3aVN6aAsJxcER7hz7u0zSZ36b_75vm7zzfjg4_3T7DwVl2azFv_iGToJjUSasbKTY0amiqemH3BsGwSqtolodNiSIljUgKsZYLRWOVio79yooPITAhJ00DQADaraUetQ9WoczOJU14kW2PqSzvqRfCwbu_BOLz7rNe1VmLZSjizoQ6AWqK_rqjkf8TcK1NEFgTqXdL4F6lmg9lagpp5Q4dAL1JZ9ijKbaPnM0uTN7GxldEE-nrnIFFluy_qURzBvPuXh12-21TnZ4_Ih-Nwr0cJ9Nz78_ZT_eX4CAAD__5TXZQ4)) ➤ **San Diego Padres** shortstop Xander Bogaerts is now the only player in baseball history to hit home runs in four different countries. WIth his homer this weekend in Mexico, he's slugged round-trippers in the U.S., Canada, England and Mexico. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb1jwMCEZGLqwpWtHC5tH_FoIEaA4_vsqnTufdDrd13W-ekp0v336jLbHMvu10xNnobmQHNQMQ7AREVANaOXpDJdJglDDZsEgYpBag0G_LnqR-qwCrlpejJFBDWRBgBJaSCmEBDNGNUUwJ3M5-yUardkkMFAvdfwudO8bxnSUJ9ZxLXlIduv90Zj6YOAYuH3fx0ZvxMDltDBwbz0DJyYGTgkG7uFDxcZf_h6w8qXgzWPtjWf_g43ntPCNWi_14BlftBa-Uj-GasNjp5SonQybxC17Sn8J_f8jvwEAAP__DnlhOg)) ➤ **MMA fighter Nate Diaz** is released on bond by New Orleans authorities after being charged with felony 2nd-degree battery in a street fight following a Misfits Boxing event. clean_body: Trump Takes On DeSantis in Iowa, Epstein Private Calendar Reveals Names, Ranking Airlines | | | | | | Monday, May 1, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering Donald Trump’s plan to intercept DeSantis in Iowa, Jeffrey Epstein’s newly revealed calendar of meetings with prominent officials, and a new ranking of the best and worst US airlines. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Trump Takes on DeSantis in Iowa Former President Donald Trump plans to for a rally on the same weekend that his rival, Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis, will be attending fund-raisers in the state. Trump's campaign says the trip has been planned for week, but it's viewed as a sign of the between the two leading contenders for the Republican nomination for president. Trump leads DeSantis by a large margin in polling nationally, and the first poll in Iowa covering all six Republican candidates shows the former there as well, 41% to 26%. Epstein Private Calendar Reveals Top Officials Jeffrey Epstein's showed scheduled meetings with a number of prominent people, including now-CIA Director William Burns, noted professor Noam Chomsky, as well as a college president and an Obama administration official, among others. According to , the meetings in the diary were arranged after Epstein served jail time in 2008 for a sex crime. The contents of the diary have not been shared publicly before. The purpose of the meetings isn't included in the documents, and those named said they met with Epstein and not for potential liaisons. 300+ UFO Cases Still Unexplained, US Says The U.S. government is currently tracking more than officials tell Congress, and while none yet provide any evidence of aliens, at least half remain unexplained. The Pentagon's All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office, tasked with investigating UFOs, has even released a video of one still-unexplained "anomaly." () Official interest in UFOs has grown since Congress passed a law last year protecting UFO whistle-blowers in the government. A half-dozen sources have since come forward with claims that they worked on ➤ Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says she has no plans to run for US Senate in 2024, easing fears among Democrats that she might try to topple NY Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand from the left. () ➤ The North Carolina Supreme Court reverses itself and reinstates voter ID laws as well as keeping a GOP-led redistricting map in place. The decision to reverse come after the Court switched from Democrat majority to Republican majority in the last election. () ➤ A proposed bill would hike California teacher salaries rise by 50% over the the next 7 years. Though it's unclear how the state would afford it, the proposed bill would create new funding targets for local districts in an effort to attract more and better teachers. () ➤ Colorado Coach Deion Sanders tweets that he's "ashamed" of the NFL for choosing only one player, Isaiah Bolden, from an HBCU (Historically Black College and University) in this year's draft. Bolden is a cornerback from Jackson State, an HBCU where Sanders had previously coached. () ➤ San Diego Padres shortstop Xander Bogaerts is now the only player in baseball history to hit home runs in four different countries. WIth his homer this weekend in Mexico, he's slugged round-trippers in the U.S., Canada, England and Mexico. () ➤ MMA fighter Nate Diaz is released on bond by New Orleans authorities after being charged with felony 2nd-degree battery in a street fight following a Misfits Boxing event. Diaz surrendered to police after an arrest warrant was issued. () Market Report Previous Week | ▲ | Nasdaq Natl. Jet Blue Which airline was rated best? ➤ The war in Sudan threatens the supply of a key ingredient in soft drinks, cosmetics and other major consumer products. Sudan produces about 70% of the world's supply of gum arabic, and there's no easy substitute for companies like Pepsi and Coca Cola. () ➤ Facebook parent Meta 's virtual reality division lost nearly $4 billion last quarter, bringing total losses for the division to $30 billion since 2020. Critics are increasingly skeptical that 3-D virtual worlds will succeed as a business. () ➤ FDA officials approve use of the first orally administered "poop pill" to help people battling dangerous gastro-intestinal infections. Technically known as fecal microbiota transplantation, the procedure delivers human stool in pill form to fight off infections such as C-diff. () ➤ Octopuses display a type of brain wave that's never been seen before, scientists say. The brain wave was found after researchers surgically attached electrodes to the brains of free-swimming octopuses, considered one of the most intelligent of non-mammal creatures. FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
May 1, 2023

Press Contact:
Chris Farmer
chris@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

VCDL Endorses Sen. Chase After Another 100% Legislative Scorecard

Senator Amanda Chase is the Only Candidate Running in Senate District 12 with a Solid 8 Year Voting Record from VCDL

CHESTERFIELD, VA- VCDL (Virginia Citizens Defense League) announced their endorsement of Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to Virginia's State Senate. This endorsement comes shortly after VCDL released their legislative scorecards for all Virginia General Assembly Legislators, which listed Senator Amanda Chase with a perfect 100% score for the 8th year, giving her a perfect lifetime 2A voting record.

"Senator Chase has represented Senate District 11 for 2 terms and holds a 100% voting record during her time in office," said Cathy McNickle, VCDL-PAC Chair. "Further, she has carried many hard-hitting 2A bills. She is now re-districted into Senate District 12. Senator Chase's 2023 survey was rated Very Pro-Gun. The Virginia Senate currently has an anti-gun majority and can't roll back Northam's 2020 and 2021 gun control packages without winning this seat. We know we can count on Amanda Chase to vote to preserve our 2A rights because she has demonstrated this time and again."

"This election is about trust," said Senator Chase. "I have a proven record of always supporting gun rights. You know you can trust me. This past session, I carried a bill that would reverse un-American red flag laws passed in 2020 that allow the government to confiscate guns without due process, which is a significant contrast from my opponent Mr. Sturtevant, who supported Red Flag legislation. I also carried a bill that would prohibit localities from creating unconstitutional gun free zones that force law abiding citizens to disarm. You can trust that I will continue to push those pieces of legislation."

All three Senate District 12 Candidates claim to support the 2nd Amendment, but Senator Amanda Chase is the only candidate running who has an 8 year voting record gun owners can trust.

The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3e89abce08d4d10874d0f9414aa9426&_e=FpszkcJ4yhqp6fMn8I1Di3fyy8CabHdNckS_ftjawNgyjFahSQJROGRY4G5-mKNnyYyg5R64Mlt0l6rGB7IcDYDBOzPapcXlk5TLBeA8fytMoIyX3SaSFp7izFIAcSkhFA9aPV--6-Ctw5iQgsN7I9SRbLxmHDzFWtwc8tg2fzWtzTgfGExDHPO7mpEwzixeGn3l-3dcj-b7E4TGuQN4EmmqqCk2e4zHsLTsAytME-RgS4TqmPie041IgQLmjBMc8Mk-TByrrxbSu34xL7DJQXY9ZyPE-5R_dcBwx6de_8eh43d7IobVvdkWzOM14F2U). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. clean_body: Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Conrad Black
subject: Our nation desperately needs The New York Sun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New York Sun
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWG-H9WDNJ

You may already know that I spent most of my career in publishing
and helped build the third largest newspaper company in the
western world.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWG-H9WDNJ

FROM THE
DESK OF CONRAD BLACK

You may
already know that I spent most of my career in publishing and
helped build the third largest newspaper company in the western
world.

We
published over 400 titles, including the London Daily Telegraph,
Chicago Sun Times, Jerusalem Post, Spectator, and most of the
leading newspapers in Canada and Australia.

I am
proud to have also been one of the founders of the modern New
York Sun, and believe that now, more than ever, it is a paper
that is uniquely suited for this moment of crisis in journalism.

Too many
journalists are not only failing to live up to public
expectations but are actively abusing public trust. Instead of
policing the powerful on behalf of the public, they police the
public on behalf of the powers they favor.

The New
York Sun has never lost sight of who it serves. It's a patriotic
newspaper that places principle over politics and people over
party. That is why I am happy to be a weekly contributor to it.
It maintains the highest professional standards without being
pedantic or boring. It's a community where I am proud to belong.

The Sun
is a lone voice among a sea of major publications owned by
multi-billion-dollar corporations that generally try to stifle
dissent.

The only
one way the Sun can win is if we all join in its effort.
Collectively we cannot be overwhelmed by any media conglomerate
or oppressive, woke, media groupthink. The Sun has long advocated
on our behalf. Now, if we join the Sun's movement to restore
American journalism, we will be unstoppable.

Membership starts at just 1¢ a day. I encourage you to sign up
now. Every single person counts.

Join the
Sun now →

Please
join us in the fight to restore America's journalism.

This is a
newspaper that our country desperately needs.

Conrad
Black
Columnist
for The New York Sun

Join the
Sun now →

Paid for by the New York Sun.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Greg Landsman: “I dropped the F bomb. This is what happened.”
body:
A father’s natural reaction
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T731c4ded-78a1-4ae2-bf79-bb8d007fe4b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**“I Dropped The F Bomb. This Is What Happened.”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0aad20f-2e97-4e86-92e1-c12b65836524/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This recent message was from Rep. Greg Landsman, who won a swing seat in Ohio's First District, _**_becoming the ONLY Democrat to beat a multi-term GOP incumbent last cycle. Nobody had been able to beat seditionist Steve Chabot in 14 years._** **Why Did Landsman curse? The natural reaction of a father to the Nashville shooting where children were murdered. **_When clueless reporters asked him if he represented his constituents by using this language, he was just as shocked._ **_Greg responded by asking what was obscene, using the F word when kids are murdered or voting to let someone with a violent history get an assault rifle to murder our children? Worse, Republicans saying they'd do NOTHING to stop the next mass murder as kids still lay where they abruptly & tragically lost their lives._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T610fc32c-9974-4687-af30-3c92f8392f46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Landsman's the kind of leader we need in Congress--someone who finds Republicans' protecting guns over children obscene, Republicans taking control of women's bodies obscene, the Republican he beat in 2022, Chabot, voting to decertify electoral votes and overthrow our republic obscene. _** _Most of our media may not have their priorities straight, but Landsman sure does._ [**__This seat is a toss-up, and EXACTLY the kind of district we MUST hold to have any chance of taking back the House. Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to courageous Congressman Greg Landsman?__**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb24e5769-8442-4f2a-adee-caea67aae815/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to win back the House from its real Speaker, Marjorie Taylor Greene._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T867c2cdc-c26e-4464-8e98-9fdddadc17f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Defunding Veterans⁉️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
I never thought the GOP would turn their backs on Veterans so much that they would defund these core, essential VA services.
Help me send a message to Congress: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd] Veterans need better services, not massive budget cuts. Donate now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd]
Veterans sound alarm on GOP budget cuts: "Don't defund Vets!"
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd]
Join my fight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd] for Veterans. We must repay and protect our veterans and active military members for their sacrifices for our country.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will process immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd]
Veterans honor our VA's mission statement "To fulfill President Lincoln's promise to care for those who have served in our nation's military and for their families, caregivers, and survivors."
The recent "Limit, Save, Grow Act of 2023," passed by all Republicans and opposed by all Democrats, does not fulfill this mission. It does the very opposite.
Defunding veteran services shows the stark contrast between Democrats and Republicans. Twenty-one Veteran groups [https://votevets.org/press-releases/votevets-joins-20-veterans-orgs-in-urging-congress-to-protect-va-budget] sounded the alarm asking for this not to pass Congress.
I, Bob Lorinser, candidate for Michigan's 1st Congressional seat, am proud to stand with them.
The 22% budget cut [https://www.va.gov/opa/pressrel/pressrelease.cfm?id=5874] to the VA would:
*
Threaten
Medical
Care
for
Veterans
.
30
million
fewer
Veteran
outpatient
visits
and
81,000
jobs
lost
across
the
Veterans
Health
Administration
*
Undermine
Access
to
Telehealth.
*
Worsen
Wait
Times
for
Benefit
s
by
eliminating
6,000
staff
of
the
Veterans
Benefits
Administration.
*
Prevent
Construction
on
the
Health
Care
Facilities
that
Veterans
need.
The
median
VA
hospital
was
built
nearly
60
years
ago
–
compared
to
just
13
years
ago
in
the
private
sector.
*
Fail
to
Honor
the
Memory
of
All
Veterans
.
Delay
the
opening
of
5
new
national
cemeteries
that
will
serve
nearly
1.6
million
Veterans.
*
Cut
Housing
for
Veterans
.
Eliminate
funding
for
as
many
as
50,000
Veterans,
putting
them
at
greater
risk
of
homelessness.
*
Increase
Food
Insecurity
for
Veterans
.
About
1.3
million
Veterans
rely
on
SNAP.
*
Deprive
Veterans
of
mental
health,
substance
use,
and
other
health
services.
*
Eliminate
Job
Training
and
Other
Supports
for
Homeless
Veterans
Approximately 62,000 Veterans live in northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. We must repay and protect our Veterans and active military members for their service and sacrifices for our country.
Outside of the direct harm to Veteran benefits, Veterans would also suffer the consequences all Americans face.
Join my fight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd] in advocating for Veterans. Please contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd] to my campaign for Congress so we can elect a Congressperson willing to stand tall against cutting services for Veterans.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vabd]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: It can be hard to keep up
body:
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
It's hard to keep track of who the Scott Perry and the Republicans are trying to hurt
Friend
Last week, when we announced my campaign for Congress in 2024, we chose April 27th as the date because it was the 85th anniversary of the first American receiving a Social Security check. We chose that date to highlight Scott Perry's plan to cut Social Security and Medicare while holding the economy hostage using the debt ceiling.
Now, the Republicans are considering cutting vital funding for veterans programs.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Scott Perry and the Republicans cannot remain in control of the House. We can stop them. DONATE NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Unfortunately, this is no surprise coming from Scott Perry and the extremists. Every election, Perry likes to remind voters that he is a veteran, but time and again he has failed to stand with his fellow veterans. Just last year he voted against the Veterans Burn Pit legislation that would help our men and women in uniform suffering from adverse effects from exposure to burn pits.
DONATE NOW to get rid of Perry, and elect members of Congress who will are dedicated to giving veterans and seniors the help they need. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
I'm glad to have you on our team, and I thank you in advance for your support!
P.S. If you missed my announcement video last week, you can check it out below.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

Just last year he voted against the Veterans Burn Pit legislation that would help our men and women in uniform suffering from adverse effects from exposure to burn pits. DONATE NOW to get rid of Perry, and elect members of Congress who will are dedicated to giving veterans and seniors the help they need. [] I'm glad to have you on our team, and I thank you in advance for your support! P.S. If you missed my announcement video last week, you can check it out below. [] DONATE NOW [] [] Daniels For Congress P.O. Box 60654 Harrisburg, PA 17106

and

for

Court

body:
We can't let that happen.

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/01000187d741022f-6c873a28-53a9-4332-8507-d4368039330c-000000/9KbQnMnuejUosfRMWqxlIRj2cw0=319)
---
| | Derek,

**BREAKING NEWS:** Manchester Mayor Joyce Craig has taken the next big step towards officially running for Governor in 2024.

From fiscal mismanagement and skyrocketing crime to even the Manchester School District being embroiled in controversial policies and lawsuits, New Hampshire has seen plenty from Manchester to determine the type of leadership Joyce Craig will bring to the Granite State.

[Will you help us immediately respond to this news by donating today and helping us hold Joyce Craig accountable for her failed leadership in Manchester while she has her eyes set on the Governor's office?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/2/01000187d741022f-6c873a28-53a9-4332-8507-d4368039330c-000000/-cdcUVwhoV0uqocnYQl8glVTmVQ=319)

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/3/01000187d741022f-6c873a28-53a9-4332-8507-d4368039330c-000000/X6XWzWwxpiNqBe7vOKqLOJpLeOU=319)
---
Now, don't get me wrong - Joyce Craig running for Governor could be the best thing for fiscal conservatives, as her record has been consistently clear the last 5 years in demonstrating her failed leadership in Manchester. [But, we still need the resources to make sure as many Granite Staters as possible understand her role in Manchester's chaos.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/4/01000187d741022f-6c873a28-53a9-4332-8507-d4368039330c-000000/vLV3IKHM1PwQTwXy8KQyNKVh7Gs=319)

[By donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today we'll be able to hold Democrats like Joyce Craig accountable for their failed policies and initiatives. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/5/01000187d741022f-6c873a28-53a9-4332-8507-d4368039330c-000000/g22U20KZwKu9e661CSh87wcl288=319)

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

name: Kash Patel
subject: This is the most personal email you’ll read today
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665491%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fcaQyJq0%2fUuD2GeEmN02TA&sysid=1)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That’s why I’ve dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn’t even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI’s unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It’s why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that’s when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we’re behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665492%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TSBNFBfA8EP4RH8Zr9YGAA&sysid=1)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665493%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cXY72EAmewqIjkSNx3J7TA&sysid=1)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you’re a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that’s what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665494%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QjyiTWrVngw0ycYMwXOTzA&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665406%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vprD9KIo1urGtTxYa6X5CA&sysid=1)
[Donate $100 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665407%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Szh5Zd1KhRF6e6mKxNw57w&sysid=1)
[Donate $250 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665408%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ILCMbcG136VIlHiZ0dPNKA&sysid=1)
[Donate $500 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665409%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g%2fG1qPFRg85BkP%2bRAR9uXw&sysid=1)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665400%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jddqI0B5PkWJbCxBy6XNvQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $2,500 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665401%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8hBJ9JXMA1GpdyF6oRQbfg&sysid=1)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665402%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BP1TocZDA2Fc5CN7OcE3zQ&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

[Will you help me raise $45,000 before the end of the week to support the Kash Foundation? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665403%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CyiM%2be4t4ScFvE4twRhXsw&sysid=1)

| | | Over 7,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! name: Laurie Teper
subject: TOMORROW needs in Raleigh to pass conservative legislation
body:
Hi fellow patriots of District 4 (and others),

We try to only send out really important information to you regarding things we need reinforcements for in North Carolina to make sure conservative values are promoted in law and elections!

As most of you know, I am working with the NC Values Coalition as their grassroots director, and we have been working tirelessly on MANY bills that have a good chance of being passed now that we have a veto-proof majority. The challenge is that the topics are very controversial, so we have to motivate the Republicans to stand up for what is right and pass these laws with significant negative pressure from the Left.

These 3 bills will be put before committee tomorrow, and we need people to come voice your opinion in support of these bills:

1\. (10am) HB808 -**Youth Health Protection Ac** t (_preventing medical transitioning for minors under the age of 18)_
Location- House Health Committee - Room 643 Legislative Office Building
<https://webservices.ncleg.gov/ViewBillDocument/2023/4195/0/DRH10383-NB-161>

2\. (1pm) HB823- **Choose your school, Choose your future** (_school choice bill)_
Location- House Education Committee- Room 643 Legislative Office Building
<https://webservices.ncleg.gov/ViewBillDocument/2023/4228/0/DRH10393-MTa-124>

3\. (2pm) HB647- **Expedite Child Permanency** (_pro-life bill; for drug addicted babies going to foster care, it puts them on a track for adoption rather than reunification with parents; puts the child first)_
Location- Room 421 Legislative Office Building
<https://webservices.ncleg.gov/ViewBillDocument/2023/4814/0/H647-PCS40451-SA-8>

If you are available to come to Raleigh to testify for 1-3 min and show support for any or all of these bills, we would be very grateful. If you plan to do so, please email me at [courtney@ncvalues.org](mailto:courtney@ncvalues.org) so I can help you with talking points.

If you are unable to come to the legislature tomorrow (5/2), please send emails or call your representatives. It is also helpful to email the Speaker of the House, Tim Moore, to make sure this bill gets voted on this week! [Tim.Moore@ncleg.gov](mailto:Tim.Moore@ncleg.gov)

Unfortunately we don't get much notice on when these bills are being heard, so it tends to be last minute like this. If you are able to help, that is wonderful. Also, please push this email out to any conservative email lists you may have!

\--

Courtney Geels
Former Candidate for US Congress NC04
Cell: (919)593-6738

## Breaking News!
---
I am excited to announce that [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21028945.11924.1.96510b53e7efe67d557aab644f0caf8c) will be hosting our first **LIVE event** on Thursday, May 11 in Miami, FL at the beautiful **Trump Doral**! We have incredible leaders from all over America joining us including **General Michael Flynn,** **Roger Stone** and a few surprises... I want to invite you to join me in Miami for what will be _an incredible evening_. The event is totally **FREE**. You can RSVP by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/doral](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21028945.11925.1.af71a7ce23659741114c61be18d175d2) Come meet **General Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , other leading Pastors as well as some surprise guests! God Bless America Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21028945.11926.1.6e99e95f4c15276862be1e3c7c538150), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21028945.11927.1.4a8f64cad031786451ec81955836315a), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21028945.11928.1.37c1c259290e61655391b7ae508b8503), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21028945.11929.1.5e9d39e5b5d780855ff5fb78f5e35e14), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21028945.11930.1.1487f1f7f62c6756a63bfa0aef4dcdfc), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21028945.11931.1.6a884c579652e4ef0a3db0ddeb90e4e6)). **In addition to breaking the law by failing to disclose vacations bankrolled by a far-right megadonor, ProPublica has revealed that Clarence Thomas didn't disclose selling property to that same billionaire, Harlan Crow. **

Justice Thomas has accepted MILLIONS in the form of private jet rides, jaunts on a super yacht and stays at an exclusive private resort. One trip alone was worth more than $500,000! **This latest revelation paints a grim picture of Thomas' corruption – and its effect on our nation's highest court. **
