name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: I hope to see your name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is why I am personally emailing you today.

| |
---
| | | Over 7,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we’re running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665427%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E7DoX0xENcRNiB94139y3w&sysid=1 "Will you accept my
invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we’re going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we’re going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665428%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tz8pGd%2bbb5fJLZJd8PVOZQ&sysid=1)
---

Democrats are counting on us, on YOU, to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It’s the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you’re with me. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665429%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jJMH8nRYlZI8bM37XYQIwQ&sysid=1 "Confirm you’re with me,
Friend. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50%
OFF:")**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665428%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tz8pGd%2bbb5fJLZJd8PVOZQ&sysid=1)
---

I can’t do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665420%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bzccz%2b5ma4L5LCsgfVYXFw&sysid=1)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

name: Kash Patel
subject: I hope this isn’t too personal
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7nh707vjcvtkgp1of1aai3n0mthrai0v9k0kda8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za4hc02okhuun0rblclrh487ljkoprv9g5niejhg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu7suqb60hf1r3kekgbvm1qg655aoc1ceh389c6g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0bu42ranpb7lmin8mrjjgbsb80tggpds37ilgmo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znin6ca32lpl3csqfgg54rbim2372s52sjvi90f0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs2i38k7t8t07poid29bvaiubeehsgq8et297ib0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znfshs11eudlmvstjpr02chibtkl2gnkc0kkeen0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z13h14rmpcf6s7klusrnceka3e38oo54potcrjb0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi8n1f87dc2r4d1t25hrobfqqlt5boo15goniki0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zquee92qlc00t7i14k7usnsh3hc4k9ng13ger560_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)
[Donate $2,500 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf0bdp0evp3jmmvtbfbgboq220tbn10e8gcki7qo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zugfpqsoc3mc4urj9flg680s07dg7dae63kiq1q0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

[Will you help me raise $45,000 before the end of the week to support the Kash Foundation? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zarle55bqnqqkritd1lcbdf4377jhaiif1vf39fo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhmcp34cjh2bs)

Ted Cruz out in 2024?

| | | | | Peter, [**_BREAKING:_ _We suspected it, but now have the recording. Ted Cruz plotted to steal the 2020 election beforehand._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taac1a1ad-9398-4eaa-b7ad-88b9f31f9403/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_In addition to being a sleazy, cruel Senator who left Texans to freeze without power as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. MSNBC broke the story last night, with tapes of Cruz talking to conspiracy nut Maria Bartiromo about a plan to create a fake commission to steal the election from President Biden._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0cedf3f3-354a-410b-9163-4f2d784eed93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Cruz must be prosecuted. And we must kick him out of the Senate in 2024, when he's up for reelection in Texas--where he only beat Beto O'Rourke by 2.5% in 2018._** **_And we have just the person to do it. Dallas-area Rep. Colin Allred's preparing to run. Raised by a single mother, Allred played in the NFL, worked in the Obama Administration and, in a huge upset, knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018. He's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, and has a ton of charisma._** [**There's a candidate fund set up to go to Allred when he gets in the race. _Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fund Allred as he removes Ted Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T350811c0-88d7-4a01-b045-23afe9e29a97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us oust this despicable traitor._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66576da1-31db-4cf3-86b2-640cee76ec7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Over 7,000 Republicans have already...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is why I am personally emailing you today.

| |
---
| | | Over 7,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zag046qa8qbp928kabj13t0ael8l7o0ik9vk0pio_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhm2o31cph2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3r2h8v6qh5o8nsgem4t0cgveslhi3vms2e67v10_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhm2o31cph2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us, on YOU, to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgal9cg427paoirogvk8q4g2tdo3c049jngac830_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhm2o31cph2bs "Confirm you’re with me, Friend. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:")**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrmi18kufuka31ec88hkjts5cqddd49kgdjj0u0o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhm2o31cph2bs)
---

I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh789ce4rdfhpmdje0u4olenuavka733eaes1590_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjhm2o31cph2bs)

body:
We’re counting on you to join the 15,000 Democrats nationwide TODAY that have already renewed their DLCC membership. | | |

| | **Here are three reasons why you should become a DLCC member →** 1\. **Grassroots support last year carried Democrats to victory,** helping flip four chambers, secure three new Democratic trifectas, and gain seats in at least 24 chambers. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA May 2: Block Biden's Big Labor Nomination
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to block Biden’s radical new labor czar, and foil a plot to ram more radical nominees through the Senate. You’ll also take on the Leftist lies about Clarence Thomas and protect your car from a new ban on gas-powered vehicles.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
First, Mayorkas betrayed his oath to the Constitution and unleashed chaos on our southern border. Then, Buttigieg fumbled the train derailment in East Palestine. Now, Biden’s taking aim at the American workforce by nominating Julie Su for Labor Secretary. **[Contact your Members of Congress to STOP Biden’s unqualified Labor Secretary!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._PRFLY3Ycx8o_JMz1L42g)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | The nation's illegal immigration crisis isn't just a problem at Biden's Southern Border. Border patrol agents have stopped more illegal immigrants at the Canadian border during the[ last seven months](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-ESPwCCQ) than they have in the last four years combined, according to Swanton Sector Chief Patrol Agent Robert Garcia. These immigrants, however, are not Canadian. Many are foreign nationals who have [flown to Canada](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) from other countries including Mexico to more easily cross into the United States. Garcia's Swanton Sector apprehended at least 3,060 illegal immigrants who crossed the border from Canada into Vermont, New Hampshire and parts of New York since October 2022. The Swanton Sector, which covers nearly 300 miles of the Canadian border, has also seen more than 1,500 got-aways this fiscal year, bringing the total number of known illegal border crossings to nearly 4,700. The number of apprehensions mark a new record for the area dating back to Fiscal Year 2004.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMjEtYTBlMDFiMTIxMzAyNDIzZThhZGY1OWVhMzY0NWI0MWQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL2RlZmVuZC1jbGFyZW5jZS10aG9tYXM_bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/nO4x5DfLts1AnseJFOPRsA)
---
Justice Clarence Thomas has served on the Supreme Court with distinction for thirty years. In dozens of cases, he’s held the Court to the Constitution. And it enrages the Left. So, they’re spewing lies about Thomas and his family to take him down. **[Speak to your Members of Congress and tell them to support Clarence Thomas!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMjEtYTBlMDFiMTIxMzAyNDIzZThhZGY1OWVhMzY0NWI0MWQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL2RlZmVuZC1jbGFyZW5jZS10aG9tYXM_bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/XjGrk0oQ_F8Ja-DmwFoiOQ)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMjEtYTBlMDFiMTIxMzAyNDIzZThhZGY1OWVhMzY0NWI0MWQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL2RlZmVuZC1jbGFyZW5jZS10aG9tYXM_bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/XudC4IgbQ4AtKPFuKvZJtw)
---
|
---
| | Flight [cancelations and delays](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._V5ekF0F3GzSDEA) are the new normal. A derailed train in East Palestine, Ohio resulted in a disastrous chemical spill, yet the U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT) was scandalously [slow to respond](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). It's a matter of priorities, and Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg has plenty of them. Just last week, it came out that Buttigieg's bloated $145.3 billion DOT budget request includes $20 million [to develop female crash test dummies](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-20uW62eWUsFmrcXUBHQ). Rep. Rosa DeLauro, who voted against a bill protecting women's sports by keeping biological males out of them, praised the expenditure as an important step to fight "gender inequity." Indeed, Buttigieg has many other urgent priorities that preclude action on train disasters and highway maintenance. Last June, he launched a $1 billion program "[to build racial equity in roads](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)." In February he addressed the issue of having too many [white construction workers](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Lh1LfrL5ZdJMpp423pMFuQ). And in April, he championed the issue of [racial inequities in traffic enforcement](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). Americans have failed to fully appreciate Buttigieg's sense of priorities, however. A Rasmussen Reports poll in March found that just 36% of voters said he should stay at his post, while [51% said he should be out of a job](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-xJoWsVSQ).
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/echxOMDA4_C2t3lLUEAUOw)
---
With a one-senator split in the Senate Judiciary Committee, Joe Biden struggles to win votes for his radical nominees. His solution? Rip Sen. Dianne Feinstein from the committee and replace her with someone who will rubber-stamp his radical appointees. **Tell your Members of Congress:[DON’T RUBBER-STAMP Joe Biden’s nominees – keep California’s elected representative in Congress!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/rmXMnbFqs3DYVWFaJAhk6w)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/NRDZhEBNpd4GKfEzV1EdeA)
---
|
---
| | Will Americans lose their privacy with a politically weaponized, government-issued digital currency? [A recent Biden executive order](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._NhPROGO3UfKs5f4KPJDw) gave the green light to study the potential development of a central bank digital currency (CBDC). A digital fiat currency, CBDC would be issued, operated and regulated by Uncle Sam. The centralized digital currency would be traceable, allowing the government visibility into our personal bank accounts. Not only would the inherently authoritarian nature of CBDC encourage government surveillance programs, but it would open the door to Chinese-style social credit scoring. Biden administration officials have already war-gamed the application of CBDC to push left-wing social goals, such as improving "financial inclusion" and "equity." It would also be designed to help with "transitioning to a net-zero emissions economy and improving environmental justice."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/dgv1n3sU2-iMPds9_5cF0g)
---
The car you drive is interfering with the president’s leftist energy agenda. He wants to enrich the electric vehicle industry and use the government to give them an edge in the marketplace. **[Contact Congress and tell them: don’t let Biden outlaw my car!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/s91Ay6fgBtBPOtmUgjJj0g)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2Mzk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/7pJ8zajN2g3OB-dcdgHJ8A)
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|

His solution? Rip Sen. Dianne Feinstein from the committee and replace her with someone who will rubber-stamp his radical appointees. Tell your Members of Congress: | | | Will Americans lose their privacy with a politically weaponized, government-issued digital currency? gave the green light to study the potential development of a central bank digital currency (CBDC). A digital fiat currency, CBDC would be issued, operated and regulated by Uncle Sam. The centralized digital currency would be traceable, allowing the government visibility into our personal bank accounts. Not only would the inherently authoritarian nature of CBDC encourage government surveillance programs, but it would open the door to Chinese-style social credit scoring. Biden administration officials have already war-gamed the application of CBDC to push left-wing social goals, such as improving "financial inclusion" and "equity." It would also be designed to help with "transitioning to a net-zero emissions economy and improving environmental justice." | | | The car you drive is interfering with the president’s leftist energy agenda. body:
Hurry and register for the Republican Action Conferenece on May 5th and 6th in Kennewick! | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fa8e0b53ed&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,

If you're planning to attend the 2023 Republican Action Conference, please [register by the end of the day today](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=89bed7bbda&e=6a281f566d)! Our final counts for meals are due soon, and we need to provide the hotel with an accurate headcount.

[Don't miss out on this incredible event with fantastic speakers and informative panels. Register today to secure your spot and join fellow Republicans in making a difference!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2f9de89367&e=6a281f566d)

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Best regards,

Amanda St. George
Director of Administrative Services
Washington State Republican Party
---
| |
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com**

Hey Peter,
Time is running out! There's just one week left to [secure your tickets](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ec0751d236&e=6a281f566d) for the [2023 Republican Action Conference](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=742c8cdcda&e=6a281f566d). Join us as we bring together Republican leaders, activists, and supporters from across Washington State to discuss critical issues, strategies, and the future of our party.

We have an incredible [lineup of speakers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=84c7399619&e=6a281f566d), including Raul Garcia, former Gubernatorial candidate who will be speaking at our Friday Night Welcome Reception, our lunch speakers: Semi Bird, 2024 Gubernatorial candidate, Joe Kent, CD-3 Congressional Candidate, and Kellyanna Brooking, Genz Media Pundit and host of "A Few Words," along with our banquet speakers: Jim Walsh, LD 19 State Representative and a keynote address from Liz Harrington, President Trump's 2024 Spokesperson.

In addition to our fantastic speakers, we're offering a variety of informative and [engaging panels](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=84e3d8ad67&e=6a281f566d) to help you make a difference in your community:
* Campaigning 101: Building a Winning Campaign
* Grassroots Activism: Organizing for Victory
* Citizen Lobbying: Influencing Olympia
* Ballot Harvesting: Collecting Republican Votes
* Campaign Fundraising 101
* Delivering Your Message

Don't miss this opportunity to connect with like-minded Republicans, learn from experienced political leaders, and become a driving force for change in our state. [Register now to secure your spot at the 2023 Republican Action Conference!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=04746404d6&e=6a281f566d)

Remember, there's only one week left to register. [Click here to reserve your seat today](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f5a2c1bb59&e=6a281f566d)!

-Team WAGOP

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW8P2_WDUN

A movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many
well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW8P2_WDUN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I am
enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will
only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our
nation's future.

A
movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many
well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president.
In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as
devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's
why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on
Presidential Selection.

By
completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as
possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand
the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue-views we
will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can
complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using
the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61758671:W8P2_WDUN:m:3:2532013465:D9F1FC960199EAA1FCDD3BC4E97351F0:r

Do you
think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College
works and its role in preserving free and representative
government?
YES
NO

For most
of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the
Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it
was considered essential to preserving free and representative
government.

But
today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an
attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This
movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because
of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with
a proper grounding in American civics-too many Americans simply
don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including
the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because
of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission
on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of
Americans in all 50 states.

These
efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of
our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online
courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American
Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide
with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets
popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding
documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and
guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of
charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including
American civics) to thousands of American educators and
homeschoolers.

Your
answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will
help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate
millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to
liberty-including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this
is especially important in this critical time for America's
future.

So please
share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National
Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon
as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can
take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61758671:W8P2_WDUN:m:3:2532013465:D9F1FC960199EAA1FCDD3BC4E97351F0:r

And after
you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting
Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since
1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty."
Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach
efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government
funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state
student grants or loans.

The
support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please
represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential
Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention-and for
your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president. Please see a special message from our sponsor: Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue-views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? YES NO For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics-too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention-and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. subject: LAST DAY FOR EARLY BIRD PRICING!
body:
Register today for the 35th Biennial Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c412d22ec7a8/last-day-for-early-bird-pricing?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| |
Don't forget to register for the 35th Biennial Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference, which will be held on September 22-24, 2023, at the Grand Hotel on Mackinac Island, Michigan.

Today is the LAST DAY for special early bird pricing, so I urge you to register now to take advantage of this opportunity to attend this historic conference at a reduced rate.

The Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference is an important event that brings together Republican leaders from across the state of Michigan and beyond. It is a unique opportunity to network with like-minded individuals, learn from experts and influencers in the field, and gain valuable insights.

This year's conference promises to be historic, with dynamic speakers, and exciting events planned. You don't want to miss out on this unique opportunity to participate in shaping the future of our great nation and join the “Party of the Constitution.”

To register for the conference and reserve your room at the Grand Hotel, please visit the following link: www.migop.org/mackinac (http://www.migop.org/mackinac). The registration process is quick and easy, and by registering today you'll be sure to get the best rate!

I look forward to seeing you at the 35th Biennial Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference and working together for victory in 2024.

In Liberty,

Kristina Karamo
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party
---

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Here’s where we’re at
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
Your support has meant the world. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62621906/404026475/1130754827?refcode=EM_FR_230501FR_N_MK_D_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI1NzMyZS0zOGU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IZ2FZl_5TMiGIKl8eHTigvZaclIFR9EKsdJM5fCmtr8=)
---
We’re almost halfway through 2023, and I want to give you a recap of where we’re at right now.

Democrats are unified, and we’re working hard to get things done for the people. With your support, we’re fired up and ready to win in 2024 from this race all the way up to the White House.

The reality is, we can only keep making progress on the big issues that face our communities if we retake the House in 2024. We’ve seen that extreme Republicans are holding our democracy hostage and stalling any progress in what matters most.

As we move forward, let’s be reminded that there’s always more that unites us than separates us. Together, we can win and keep making progress for Ohioans – and I know that I can always count on your support.

Thank you,

Marcy Kaptur
---
| | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. **Can you help Marcy by giving any amount today?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62621907/404026476/1130754827?refcode=EM_FR_230501FR_N_MK_D_4_NG_N_Biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI1NzMyZS0zOGU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IZ2FZl_5TMiGIKl8eHTigvZaclIFR9EKsdJM5fCmtr8=)

body:
Organized labor and unions built America’s middle class

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62622120/404027469/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjcyOTkxYS0zOWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-cCgBcSRbu-VJXVpOuZiXdDKrHKhh05I02bVyHeDLI=&emci=8c126c27-1fe8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cb72991a-39e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Today is May Day – a holiday dedicated to honoring the sacrifices and hard-fought victories of America’s working class and labor movement: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62622121/404027470/-146036107?refcode=E21361-20230501-MayDay-graphic-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjcyOTkxYS0zOWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-cCgBcSRbu-VJXVpOuZiXdDKrHKhh05I02bVyHeDLI=) Organized labor and unions built America’s middle class – and I know this firsthand. When I was in graduate school, I joined the GEO UAW Local 2322, a unit of teaching assistants, associates, and project assistants at the University of Massachusetts at Amherst. Then, as a teacher, I was a member of the National Education Association, which gave us the collective power to negotiate for health insurance, retirement, paid sick leave, and fair pay. Today, I’m extremely proud that we’ve built a campaign by and for working people – particularly Vermont’s fire fighters, electrical workers, building and construction workers, teachers, nurses, machinists, and many, many more. **Only through unions, labor, and by prioritizing the voices and experiences of real people can we build an economy that puts workers first. ** In solidarity, Becca Balint
---

It's happening! I'm so excited to be here on Substack, and I'm thrilled to be sending you my first newsletter on this platform.
If you're looking for an unconventional perspective on popular topics, you're in the right place. As a former representative in Congress, I'll be discussing politics, of course, but many other things, too. Much of this is for my own catharsis, so I'll be letting loose in ways I simply haven't before.
I entered politics to take on the political establishment and defend the principles of liberty. In my dozen years as a state representative and congressman, I defied party leaders, introduced innovative legislation, forged unique coalitions, and cast far more lone no votes than any of my colleagues. My political independence made me a top target of both old parties, but I never bowed to the pressure.
Along the way, I learned a lot: about the dysfunction of Congress, the potency of tribalism, and the disconnect between perception and reality.
The least practical approaches are sold as sensible, while the most practical ones are denounced as absurd. Major problems are ignored or dismissed as irrelevant, while minor issues are hyped as paramount. Concentrated power is venerated in the name of "democracy," while representative government is bypassed in pursuit of outcomes. Hypocrisy abounds and so does whataboutism.
Through it all, I've been encouraged to find so many people who still believe at their core in the principles that make human cooperation and progress possible, and I'm convinced that only by persuading others and building a better understanding of the value of liberty can we secure a free future.
My Substack explores all this and much more. I'll name names and bring the receipts. I hope you'll join the conversation.
* * *
Get regular updates from me delivered directly to your inbox. If you become a _paid_ subscriber, you'll also be able to:
* Access exclusive posts and podcast episodes.

* Comment on posts.
* Join special events, including conversations with me on Substack Chat.
* Enjoy other benefits from time to time.

Thanks for making this possible!

name: Rep. Shontel Brown
subject: A blatant attempt to suppress democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
They know we have the votes; now they’re changing the rules.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62622528/404029178/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230501OHAmendment_Abortion_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGYzNDU2NS0zOWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o_9H-zSr_oLTTfUKnPxEIiiiRNbvkan6nhCT1VPcmR4=) I am outraged by the latest move from the Ohio GOP, Peter.

To defeat November’s abortion referendum, the GOP is pushing to hold an August special election to increase the threshold for constitutional amendments.

**_This comes just months after Governor DeWine did away with special elections for being a waste of resources._** Yet, now that an abortion rights amendment will go to voters in November, they’re trying to bring special elections back to defeat the majority they know pro-choice advocates have.

This move is so blatantly anti-democratic and hypocritical that a bipartisan group of former Ohio governors, including John Kasich, Bob Taft, Dick Celeste, Ted Strickland, and more, has united against raising the constitutional threshold.

The GOP’s underhanded tactics aren’t fooling anyone. **_This is only further evidence that Congress urgently needs to pass the Women's Health Protection Act._** But to do this, Peter, we need to take back the House and elect enough pro-choice leaders to protect abortion rights federally.

[**_Will you chip in $5 right now to help me in the fight to reclaim our Democratic majority in the House and defend abortion rights from the Ohio GOP’s hypocrisy? The fight isn’t over for Ohio abortion advocates, but with the GOP tilting the playing field in their favor, we must act to protect these rights at a federal level._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62622529/404029192/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230501OHAmendment_Abortion_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGYzNDU2NS0zOWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o_9H-zSr_oLTTfUKnPxEIiiiRNbvkan6nhCT1VPcmR4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62622530/404029207/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230501OHAmendment_Abortion_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_EL1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGYzNDU2NS0zOWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o_9H-zSr_oLTTfUKnPxEIiiiRNbvkan6nhCT1VPcmR4=)**

clean_body: They know we have the votes; now they’re changing the rules. = I am outraged by the latest move from the Ohio GOP, Peter. To defeat November’s abortion referendum, the GOP is pushing to hold an August special election to increase the threshold for constitutional amendments. This comes just months after Governor DeWine did away with special elections for being a waste of resources. Yet, now that an abortion rights amendment will go to voters in November, they’re trying to bring special elections back to defeat the majority they know pro-choice advocates have. This move is so blatantly anti-democratic and hypocritical that a bipartisan group of former Ohio governors, including John Kasich, Bob Taft, Dick Celeste, Ted Strickland, and more, has united against raising the constitutional threshold. The GOP’s underhanded tactics aren’t fooling anyone. This is only further evidence that Congress urgently needs to pass the Women's Health Protection Act. But to do this, Peter, we need to take back the House and elect enough pro-choice leaders to protect abortion rights federally. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = I know I can count on you, Rep. name: Jay Inslee
subject: It's time to pass the torch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
I have an announcement.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/~jRKhWxm27fe/dXRUVmhQUEhBbXJUZ2JsUERpZlRUclYybG9WeWdlRUd1K1BTbXViZWZ2VU5iYXdkajhyaWNQVzg2Rk1BRFpWV25yZk81YmdZZjU4NVF4S2kxQVBteVlqejBZdEg1TzErR0xBbEk5THR2STA9S0/bEhKWGtqTEdoMlI5TGhzNWgxRkZuTGU3aWpPb0NoZ2Y4NW5Ea3VkUEVCWT0S1) Friend, Over the last 10 years, we've made Washington state a beacon of progress. Now, it's time to pass the torch. **Today, I 'm announcing I will not be seeking re-election in 2024.** Serving as governor of Washington state has been my greatest honor and most humbling responsibility. Together, we've accomplished so much. We set the standard for climate progress. We created one of the best economies in the country -- and made sure workers felt the benefits. We protected reproductive freedom, secured the nation's best family leave benefits, passed gun safety reform, invested in education, and so much more. Now, we have another year and a half to keep focusing on issues critical to Washingtonians, like addressing the homelessness crisis, speeding our efforts to expand behavioral health services, and continuing our fight against climate change. No elected leader succeeds on their own. And I thank the many people who chose to work for me, campaign with me, and provide their honest insights all along the way. You challenged me to think differently, dream bigger, and get the job done. I want to thank you, specifically, and everyone reading this email. This grassroots movement has beaten the odds time and time again. Whether you've chipped in to hit our fundraising goals, signed petitions, or read along to stay up to date on our progress, I'm so grateful for your support. Hear me when I say that our online organizing from emails like this one made all the difference for the critical progress we made in Washington state, and across the country. Time and time again, you trusted me with your vote, your priorities, and your dreams for everything our state could be. I hope I made you proud. Very truly yours, Jay
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=22377432&r=NjM1MTU5NDU3MzQ5S0&j=MjYwMDA1MDAwMAS2&l=11250994&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). subject: Take the National Survey on Election Fraud
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTIxLWRhYjM0MjM5YjQ3ZDRlODViYjhhNjYxNWQ1ZDg5NDhiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3ZvdGVyLWZyYXVkLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXZvdGVyZnJhdWQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUItQUVfU1BPMzgyNzEifQ/ELJ9aT-0010eiZAvQ2BgEg)

Dear Fellow Conservative,

I’ll bet you’ve heard this one before: _voter fraud doesn’t exist—it’s just a ploy._

That’s the baseless narrative constantly pushed by Leftists politicians, liberal fanatics, and their mainstream media mouthpiece.

_Apparently,_ election fraud only exists when The Left loses elections. The preposterous hypocrisy of the radical Left simply knows no bounds.

But if election fraud doesn't exist, then why was a Democrat operative arrested late last year for ‘widespread voter fraud’ in Pennsylvania?

And what about Janet Reed, an Evansville, Indiana, Democratic Party activist, who sent illegally pre-marked absentee ballot applications to voters ahead of the 2020 primary election?

In Arizona, Victor Aguirre, a convicted felon, was charged with illegally voting in the 2020 general election. And in Minnesota, Linda Maria Stately, a convicted felon, was also charged with illegally voting in the 2020 general election.

These are just a few of the _hundreds_ of proven instances of election fraud included in The Heritage Foundation’s Election Fraud Database—which recently topped 1,400 cases—ranging from ineligible voting, fraudulent absentee ballots, illegal ‘assistance’ at the polls, false registrations, and more!

The reality is that voter fraud _does_ exist and it is on the rise, despite the radical Left’s attempts to minimize this issue.

And to ensure that this urgent matter is addressed through aggressive reform and oversight, today I’m asking you to join other concerned citizens by completing our [**National Survey on Election Fraud >>**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTIxLWRhYjM0MjM5YjQ3ZDRlODViYjhhNjYxNWQ1ZDg5NDhiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3ZvdGVyLWZyYXVkLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXZvdGVyZnJhdWQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUItQUVfU1BPMzgyNzEifQ/uNqS0XXZ0EyyYDSbc-xVxA)

Your answers will help us pressure lawmakers to pursue aggressive oversight and reform and hold those who enable fraud legally accountable.

The survey should only take a minute to complete, but your input is invaluable to this work. You can get started right now using the secure link below: [https://secured.heritage.org/voter-fraud-survey/](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTIxLWRhYjM0MjM5YjQ3ZDRlODViYjhhNjYxNWQ1ZDg5NDhiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3ZvdGVyLWZyYXVkLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXZvdGVyZnJhdWQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUItQUVfU1BPMzgyNzEifQ/uW_5gdsDXrgmg_tjDFGAuQ)

Regards,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Tell the NY Judge to Hold Trump in Contempt and Punish Him
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell the NY Judge to Hold Trump in Contempt and Punish Him](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcaf0cf26-61c5-4371-aaf5-02033983cf2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda9e6377-b3f6-4721-bb7c-cce93bcdc120/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | During Trump's arraignment in early April, Judge Juan Manuel Merchan [warned Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tade5f4be-5e8c-459f-88ee-6d4a06ad63f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to stop making statements about the case which could endanger public safety or make it difficult to hold a fair trial.

**[Trump has basically ignored him](https://default.salsalabs.org/T191aa12d-ad1b-488e-9129-b05184a692cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and continued making incendiary statements on social media and elsewhere, including direct attacks on the Judge himself.** He is putting public safety at risk, and he is clearly trying to taint the jury pool.

**Any other criminal defendant in a similar situation would already be held in contempt, and fined or even jailed.** Trump is not above the law, and he should be treated the same.

[**Add your name: Tell Justice Merchan to hold Trump in contempt, and fine or jail him.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d8cd4be-108b-4698-8c27-6c841c03994a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cc133af-bfff-44e0-902c-4ace5f5173d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta80d2251-a480-4561-8f92-23252f843d52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T781628b1-669a-4f0f-bd81-6117ae6a6945/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Supreme Court Update
subject: re: Supreme Court and Social Security >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING: Supreme Court to hear a case that could "threaten to END" Social Security!**

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10628%2E9716520%2E0gF5hR)
**We urgently need to know where you stand:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10628%2E9716520%2E0gF5hR)
---
| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10628%2E9716520%2E0gF5hR)
---

It's clear, team: With _Roe_ overturned, **_NOTHING_** is safe from the _ultra_ -conservative Supreme Court majority.

**And now, they're about to hear a case that experts say could _"threaten to end"_ Social Security!** **_65 million Americans_ could LOSE the benefits they earned.**

We can’t let the Supreme Court attack this _**bedrock**_ of Americans' retirement, so we need to take action -- _now._ We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support Social Security. _But we’re still 38 responses short in Pennsylvania!_

**Please answer before midnight:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10628%2E9716520%2E0gF5hR)
---
| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230501-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10628%2E9716520%2E0gF5hR)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you.

name: Stefanie's iPhone
subject: apologies for any typos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. I'm typing this from my iPhone so apologies in advance for any typos, but this is urgent: _I just pulled the numbers and last night we fell $1,158 short of our end-of-month goal._
Listen, our team is so grateful for everything that you've already done to support this campaign – donating, believing in Kirsten and standing up for our Senate majority.
So I wish I didn't have to ask for your help again, but in a fight like this one, that $1,158 could make all the difference. That's why we've decided to extend our deadline for another 24 hours. **Please, will you chip in $5, $25 or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight? Kirsten is counting on you to dig deep tonight so that we have the resources to defend our Senate majority and compete with the GOP's megadonors.**
**Here's your personal donation link:[https://www.secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62634724/404075880/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4122-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODQzYTQ0Ni01ZWU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8numy7xXmgAmmyITyy8ZEnSf1Nf3TdnzR3oq38q-e0=)**
Thank you so much,

Stefanie

Sent from my iPhone

clean_body: | | | Friend, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. I'm typing this from my iPhone so apologies in advance for any typos, but this is urgent: I just pulled the numbers and last night we fell $1,158 short of our end-of-month goal. Listen, our team is so grateful for everything that you've already done to support this campaign – donating, believing in Kirsten and standing up for our Senate majority. So I wish I didn't have to ask for your help again, but in a fight like this one, that $1,158 could make all the difference. That's why we've decided to extend our deadline for another 24 hours. Please, will you chip in $5, $25 or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight? Kirsten is counting on you to dig deep tonight so that we have the resources to defend our Senate majority and compete with the GOP's megadonors. Here's your personal donation link:= Thank you so much, Stefanie Sent from my iPhone | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=001b0b405bc1427288ca280c1f68c222&_e=WTFEg1NHhmFz3HdQT1FKROTAKP1Dcchg1Yj6T6Ck7Jal9GGzN4X0tthpKTU5anh3jDs3x0w8yQ7hS3bxY1s-RTLXoZA7dAU12Tzc91SGIUKYEGoLyxOGODaoEQfc3WfBwL8xtv-RVyKfZoZrX2jMk0WeBJaZFeqZ2uqMKm7gzapYDyTK1IHmzrSwWKiWR1OE7rfdZ3uy2_M92yFiblTPsIgzKLgjnuFqye9rgnLcZnSmj5cgvBO2UXB5Cvczt5_tCyKZwYrnvkn2iF87Lg3PG09zHMKCAqACxbEzvF6ghq7lDSw6PV14JNpC_P5wp0A1UfCt3za8mItm8so_h8ZRgNh6j0RP93a_y86zQ4WGYKV23zeBz2zLQ-YGzKuUxhlYyut-X-cb5oWDlAvGDJSbjImgoMJgdOj8bekmWUNFoDA%3D)
That was our average donation last month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 3 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Kash Patel
subject: This is the most personal email you’ll read today
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e590fff5471b40318f32d9e422192d4b&_e=ORSBYrY8f_f-mZvxLt6ZUfxlFydGL4tOcPfbb9o-ORNG5y1S4ksbGfgkYBfh1Z7iYEM_hgK1-X6giQziPLDkXNEb35qTxT80sH3NHxZPohydl1siOpQ3Oi_iAtmvIuw9QovXM2IvjU7-Lgzg1d-9vhRL44zJv2rrXIurOc-f6EAx8f61X8cpDW0J6MtVzyYUbEOuMWD4aAxJukDbzDXA3YUaHAPO6GH0ez45sC9WCIHF6diP-QDk-STXginBVlWe)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e590fff5471b40318f32d9e422192d4b&_e=ORSBYrY8f_f-mZvxLt6ZUfxlFydGL4tOcPfbb9o-ORNG5y1S4ksbGfgkYBfh1Z7iYEM_hgK1-X6giQziPLDkXNEb35qTxT80sH3NHxZPohwslIq5NuU-dQEu0uSx5Ey10vnXCg9SJGFt_oklCM9WvYnV6QYzHpucDFWCMsa87LoOewAEnU10zpWRmp0ycLH7lFIsVe0maDyVYeR8Em1Eueh9JghdmMEfe1huL8HrvY6ISC4nia9dfUlTJNXq0BKF)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e590fff5471b40318f32d9e422192d4b&_e=ORSBYrY8f_f-mZvxLt6ZUfxlFydGL4tOcPfbb9o-ORNG5y1S4ksbGfgkYBfh1Z7iYEM_hgK1-X6giQziPLDkXNEb35qTxT80sH3NHxZPohzi86578Ba7EEKtN-OHn9mt8O_GoNrNTRoqZzbyP7Ve3in4PCLbMZ2c5slTVRR34Yuu2IfLBKERd4HzWKQ5uP4NlsPSfjd-4r6rxi4Efgk5EfIeO1HjkdeBdtVPTQOIAM8aCk2KVXXFl8YoHtdd6enD)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

clean_body: I never thought that my own government would spy on me. Hello Friend, I never thought that my own government would spy on me. I have always loved my country. That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad , it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever ... Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionall y to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees. As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters. I set a goal to raise $45,000 by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal. Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are innocent until proven guilty must join together in this fight. Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system. This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution. Due process has been destroyed. We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots. Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing. Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below. Thank you, Kash Patel P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles. I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots. The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

**Chicago Teachers Union spends historic money, installs one of its own as mayor**
---
“Chicago Teachers Union (CTU) **violated its own policy by using member dues to donate $2.3 million to Mr. Johnson’s campaign**...according to the Illinois Policy Institute.”
---
[**DEFEAT TEACHERS UNIONS >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19846%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=25SdkP9Wah29SqyT27z%2bhw&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, the Chicago Teachers Union just spent **$2.3 MILLION** to elect anti-school choice activist Brandon Johnson to Mayor of Chicago. Johnson has already denounced school choice and will work to rip away education options from Chicago families. Teachers unions will continue pouring money into races like this nationwide because they are scared. **A school choice revolution is sweeping the nation, and they’re doing everything in their power to derail it.**
---
[**DEFEAT TEACHERS UNIONS >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19846%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=25SdkP9Wah29SqyT27z%2bhw&sysid=1)

| | We have teachers unions on the ropes, but we need your help to keep them there. **We're counting on your immediate support by MIDNIGHT tonight to help double our efforts and combat the deep-pocketed teachers unions.** Your donation will help us keep the pressure on the teachers unions and send a message that **parents and students are not backing down.** Every dollar counts, and your contribution can make a real difference in this critical fight for our children's future.**[Rush an urgent donation now to help us keep the teachers union on their heels.>>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19847%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fi6z7884rEQMoNDBfoiG9g&sysid=1)**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: On behalf of millions of female athletes:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
\
I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze57ab24p2b5cdkc2f303imajmnkjf0vn2fudg18_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmcp34c5h2bs)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zriem5obce53vavhk58kdvhh5bcp10cbdu3pcito_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmcp34c5h2bs "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4t3pf62vvsopgkhb0n9jk0apuo5a9nfdbc7unko_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2p35c3h2bs "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z51jr8hcikostlm2gvn5hh2kgtdl0i72s8hcdn40_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2p35c3h2bs "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP
---
