name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tell Congress: Pass the DREAM Act of 2023!
body:
Sign and send
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e6ec87e-208b-40b7-819d-662643ece570/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The bipartisan DREAM Act of 2023 (S. 365) has just been re-introduced. It would give almost 2 million undocumented immigrants brought to the U.S. as children a path to U.S. citizenship. DREAMers want to work, study, and contribute to building our great nation. And, while 600,000 DREAMers are temporarily protected by the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program, the Supreme Court is considering cases that could end DACA at a moment's notice. [**Tell your members of Congress: We're tired of waiting. We need the DREAM Act now.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T225181e0-2427-4a3a-8156-2a13004d5a67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44030e97-9951-41aa-bf2f-83ad196664c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/tellcongresspassthedreamact-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T876b1ece-70ea-4ab0-8be5-4899d82838cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=7ad2fcc0-c19c-4fb0-9d0d-b2c6a5aa6266&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=7ad2fcc0-c19c-4fb0-9d0d-b2c6a5aa6266&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Jen Psaki
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Respectfully asking for you to take a look at this.

Friends -
Shortly after I launched the Campaign for Democracy, I went on Jen Psaki’s new MSNBC show to talk about it. There are a few clips below. **I hope you’ll click and watch at least one of them.**
We talked about DeSantis' insane gun bill and why he cowardly signed it in private behind closed doors after the Nashville shooting:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2182?t=1&akid=1342%2E4767699%2EbeizpQ)
We talked about why I watch Fox News and growing up with dyslexia.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2183?t=2&akid=1342%2E4767699%2EbeizpQ)
Or you can watch the entire show here:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2184?t=3&akid=1342%2E4767699%2EbeizpQ)
Thank you for clicking,
Gavin
* * *

👋🏻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-may-23/?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em230502-1-t1g&refcode2=1342_4767699_beizpQ&akid=1342%2E4767699%2EbeizpQ)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-may-23/?express_lane=true&refcode=em230502-1-t1g&refcode2=1342_4767699_beizpQ&akid=1342%2E4767699%2EbeizpQ)**
---
****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1342%2E4767699%2EbeizpQ).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Kash Patel
subject: I hope this isn’t too personal
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znvs8v2vhprpb2irem7gfoc5hjnur8p92u7cmq38_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zicium6upt4hk48iea26ai7aaltnu3hi191ef710_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3cehrkr5smgms4hbpoccq25au3arj18b1fhbu80_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkh160tjiapcmtrrmb1co1bsqqofvda22eo7fkso_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9hjkns96sjd8l5j9ltmj7ouqcfqiipdfuu7beq8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zipk39jm0mb5vhpqll18gun2nim06f2klsfiu6o0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0mbk63afluqm2g5s3vioo94nb54ui73s0mlns8o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmo8dr26vv5m6peu82qt3pnsika6vhpe1kmctpmg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z94ftm1jhc70pkqkhb36t0o147pvlhhv3f70aqt0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk6mhgn0c9hbu6us2m7mu7qio6dpt14kvmpujst0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)
[Donate $2,500 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbp2kombmh2vdgijuv3m1hr006j772ro92np92tg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zadlhb0hc90981jg5jk1u5pqnal7mmaavvmse6lo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

[Will you help me raise $45,000 before the end of the week to support the Kash Foundation? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zknfbfnhddpoh8cjgsj6i8ut30hk6dnsfeejasl8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjm2o76c9h2bs)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Some good news to share, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I can only hope the coming months are as strong as April. Peter — I looked at our April fundraising numbers this morning, and I need to start with a big thanks.

Thousands of you contributed to my re-election campaign last month! Thank you. It’s great to see this kind of support when I know just how much we need it.

But I’m going to be direct — May and the following months will be tough. The primary is in about two weeks, and once my opponent is declared, the attacks and spending against me will increase.

That's why my team and I aren't wasting any time preparing for the fight ahead. **Will you help us prepare for the next phase of this campaign? Please contribute ahead of our final pre-primary reporting deadline tonight at midnight to help me take on whichever Republican opponent wins on May 16 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-preprimary-deadline-23?refcode2=personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62626991/404045579/833868747?refcode=em23_230501_filng6_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230501_filng6_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cd1b85b8-43e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDFiODViOC00M2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6a_z9h6mNfqufV7vZNEJQANMsw3QiJeO5hCAj5wQD8=)**

I'll never stop fighting for our Commonwealth. My mission is clear: Continue leading and serving the people of Kentucky by tearing down barriers, reaching across the aisle, and finding common ground for the betterment of our communities. In the last three years, we've proven that we can rise above partisan fighting and find solutions that enhance the lives of Kentuckians across every zip code.

But if we're going to continue making progress, I need your support as we prepare for this race to heat up. Election experts are already calling it the most competitive race in the entire country this year, and outside groups have already spent millions to boost my opponents. We need to ensure we have the resources to fight back against any attack that comes our way.

**If you're with me, chip in whatever you can afford before our final pre-primary reporting deadline and help me win the most competitive race of the year. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-preprimary-deadline-23?refcode2=personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62626995/404045583/833868747?refcode=em23_230501_filng6_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230501_filng6_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cd1b85b8-43e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDFiODViOC00M2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6a_z9h6mNfqufV7vZNEJQANMsw3QiJeO5hCAj5wQD8=)**

Sincerely,

Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

name: The team at VoteVets
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We had some big wins in April
#
Derek -
We emailed a lot over the last few days, but we wouldn’t do it if it weren’t so important. And thanks to you, we had some big wins in April.
In tough times like these, it’s important to celebrate those wins.
FOX was forced to settle a major lawsuit, pay out hundreds of millions of dollars, and admit that they lied.
Tucker Carlson, one of the biggest sources of disinformation and conspiracy theories on the right, was FIRED. Huge.
When McCarthy and his MAGA allies pushed a budget that cut $30 BILLION from the VA, nearly 10,000 of you took action with VoteVets.
And now, the GOP is running scared. As they should be.
But there’s a lot left to do in May.
We have to finish the job and make sure Hannity and Ingraham are kicked off of every Military TV. We have to continue to hold FOX accountable and call out their lies. And we have to keep up the pressure on McCarthy and the MAGA right to defend the VA and prevent a disastrous default on our debt.
High stakes, to be sure.
[**But today, all we’re asking is for you to endorse VoteVets’ mission. Sign on here, and recommit to this work. It might seem like a small thing, but it speaks volumes about what we’re trying to do together.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230501_vv_sign/?source=em230501_1_15&refcode2=8399.3013755.GFCiep&t=1&akid=8399%2E3013755%2EGFCiep)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230501_vv_sign/?source=em230501_1_15&refcode2=8399.3013755.GFCiep&t=2&akid=8399%2E3013755%2EGFCiep)
---
We could not do this without you. So thank you again.
The team at VoteVets

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn4tcur7as37jfourgah9cn8b7503o5akqldokpo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmepj0c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgagimfa95i0cql1di4p1i595kd5oubpqob8qqpg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmepj0c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze4v0jenjfm7oc15crv0nn1vltiobd80u34r85m8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmepj0c1h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkek39vb4ogqdmj8opaids1i659fds55jc7h8l08_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmepj0c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z501d2tspkc43f9aofmnu4g070uge6tj22d3l9ng_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmepj0c1h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0gcd7gavpck347kf55bbamh5plv8aals3uplum0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmepj0c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogat0kjst7ra2cd3jf9cqo5jbv1q73cle1f8joo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmepj0c1h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjp9e5093p6n2lm2v0ndg5vsh6vn439regs7fu38_rp22sh2s8i66o72cjjmepj0c1h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

subject: A return to sanity

body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | The status quo in Washington has failed - and it's putting the accumulated cost on the backs of the American people.

Democrats don't want to admit it, but our children and grandchildren are on the hook for more than **_$31 TRILLION_ **in debt.
_**I can’t sleep at night knowing that all this spending by the Washington establishment is fueling the inflation we see across the country.**_

**House Republicans are taking a stand and DEMANDING that Washington STOP its free for all spending - but with Joe Biden sure to veto it, we need all the help we can get.**
[**Join us today and help build a Republican Party that will BRING DOWN OUR DEBT once and for all!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=548d8c114fa64b569f75248d69cd420d&_e=PULKUP83YQshqL5MrQsIzhsG9cJqWPjXVSy9B5TfBpdhcuLR5PLG_d-zhQcmnYJ_Cb4-wOa-aTmx9afGNqANJ0ObFZyC6s1SGRgNbuR5VxoRYzdVXzqYLHmiWkgw1i5mBo-PdZIblIaDFbLbkhhsBoYEKvJgNnCuFq2x9STbgRBtcAVhxBg1rXRRsBQfSXxzyoIKW4WoREMuQrqWMIidgynlTXhJKDn4lc_bZvgaMuwIG_pP1mlASNB7bO8KNsGt9Dj3LoBRnE_kXqGsXh_gUOkYoXxZShD1oESEGaRE7WFtvOn_sX0mXuF_SLUXc93OlK7cAax-NG8vLKT-mDmtxd_ym8hVtsjjBL-EaPgaAMM%3D)

| | I’ve told you a little bit about what my goals are, Peter, but let me tell you what Joe Biden wants to do with your money.

His proposed budget would add _**$1.4 trillion**_ in federal spending for far-Left programs like **_Green New Deal initiatives_ **and _**“diversity, equity, and inclusion”**_ programs.

This nonsense is funded with massive amounts of new debt and tax hikes that are aimed at American businesses and families.

The effects would be devastating -**a 1.3% decrease in wages and 335,000 jobs lost.**

Across the country, Republicans are working to stop this socialist spending and put us back on the path to fiscal sanity.

It’s time to shrink the power of Washington and bring more money back into your pocket.

[**Support the Republican plan to STOP socialist spending in Washington now!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=548d8c114fa64b569f75248d69cd420d&_e=PULKUP83YQshqL5MrQsIzhsG9cJqWPjXVSy9B5TfBpdhcuLR5PLG_d-zhQcmnYJ_Cb4-wOa-aTmx9afGNqANJ0ObFZyC6s1SGRgNbuR5VxoRYzdVXzqYLHmiWkgw1i5mBo-PdZIblIaDFbLbkhhsBoYEKvJgNnCuFq2x9STbgRBtcAVhxBg1rXRRsBQfSXxzyoIKW4WoREMuQrqWMIidg1bTwC1GJysUiP9lEyRxOm-YOzoec-pl_sjT7BdhvUtJSn5PfO_yvfRhMRfVl98VnivNmM_4l6DkJSg6UoqriFqNcPUYF2WBhYxy50forMqEkYn-1YRup4heRLuK7X70qsYCzBnxHcoatX8mF8Efk6M%3D)

name: Mark Ruffalo
subject: I’m with Helen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Hi, it’s Mark Ruffalo. Today, I want to tell you about the leader I believe Philadelphia needs as its next mayor: Helen Gym.

I’m supporting Helen because climate change and environmental injustice are the great crises of our time, and dire issues require urgent, transformative solutions. In this race, Helen is the only candidate with the vision and follow-through to rise to this moment.

Only Helen has introduced a Green New Deal for Philadelphia Schools. As Mayor, she’ll transform toxic, dilapidated classrooms into safe and green places for kids to learn by modernizing facilities, creating good-paying union jobs for students, and revitalizing neighborhood schools.

She’ll make traveling to and from school safer and greener, too. Helen has plans to provide free public transit to students, electrify more vehicles, and provide needed services (like more crossing guards and public safety monitors) along kids’ routes to and from school.

And Philadelphians can rely on Helen to do what she says. She has been taking on big fights and delivering real solutions for decades — like when she organized parents, faculty, and local leaders to ensure safe drinking water in every public school.

Our children and teachers deserve drinkable water, safe classrooms, and a sustainable future worth fighting for. That makes Helen Gym the right choice for Philadelphia’s next Mayor.

If you’re with Helen, too, please join me in supporting her by chipping in $5, $10, $20.23, or whatever you can spare to support her. With so many candidates and so little time left in this race, every vote and every dollar matters. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em]

Thank you,
Mark Ruffalo
Actor & Activist
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Another Day. Another Attack. But Different... Also Clarification
body:
Mainstream Pastors Join The Mainstream Media To Attack Today, the Guardian released a hit piece on me and Pastors For Trump. I am used to the Mainst
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11957.1.1dcb51b9aa7224cc586c7d3fc04113ac) |
---
## Mainstream Pastors Join The Mainstream Media To Attack
---
Today, [the Guardian](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11958.1.32d6348b956a45e95b9abf86dd486725) released a hit piece on me and [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11959.1.ebf67de6a7f78ed22fe64b8ab0f02ba2). I am used to the Mainstream Media attacking but this piece was different... **Mainstream Christian Leaders** joined the **Mainstream Media** to attack our efforts to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. This tells me we are WAY over the target! I want to ask you to partner with [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11960.1.f80cadbd1b378dab4e4a91597cfdc6c2) as we prepare for the upcoming 2024 Election. Here is how you can help: 1\. Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11961.1.0a6aeca32cf9c0fc0c1d277811be12b2) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11962.1.5eaeca569291281591c3715271e82251)
2\. Invite your others to join you for our upcoming National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11963.1.ef995443c84415a81f50848734c7adaf).
3\. Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11964.1.03c5811c0b1c0da331dff6116a3906f0)
| 1. | Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11965.1.f48f59a099170be1a65f9ae2a7354f11) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11966.1.672d080de33cee846ee3669656cd9c2d)
---|---
2. | Invite your others to join you for our upcoming National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11967.1.2f894d2f23f075aa824f683b72f4cd9f).
---|---
3. | Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11968.1.cb3435983da728693342fd89f0149d62)
---|---
God Bless America
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11969.1.2260403c16732b401c430a8f0d68cdc4), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11970.1.c1351c5827a370f1a0cdbf817b3ce896), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11971.1.a23200ceef5b03d92fb505ad7a6324c0), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11972.1.6d0ed9049a67d7865d1a6bed46f930cf), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11973.1.66bd7d93ea85ea34b0ae8d1010a01f0c), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11974.1.7a7870a51240de717baa1c87fb3f2485)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11975.1.5629877068048eacedec9776ca48f3a1)
---
## Breaking News! & Clarification
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11976.1.6e627f58a71df79dc51f54d600b04ba3)
---
I am excited to announce that [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11977.1.1aeecf3de5e7357f637b4780de180d5f) will be hosting our first **LIVE event** on Thursday, May 11 in Miami, FL at the beautiful **Trump Doral**! We have incredible leaders from all over America joining us including **General Michael Flynn,** **Roger Stone** and a few surprises... I want to invite you to join me in Miami for what will be _an incredible evening_. This event is **NOT just for Pastors** but is open to all. The event is totally **FREE**. You can RSVP by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/doral](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11978.1.590012200ca402cbe638d0e326d595e2) Come meet **General Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , other leading Pastors as well as some surprise guests!
---
| | [ RSVP: Trump Doral ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11979.1.bad31d2e95dbb8fe6cb53be1d2a5f0f1)

## God Did What God Does...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11980.1.23641b0d5d5032ffad65f141d0783c96)
---
This WKND at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11981.1.a1bd5997fd2fc9ad17e479d145b02d88) OKC & Tulsa, the Power of God became tangible and as a result we saw incredible breakthroughs.
I want to share with you the message that I preached, and I know that just as it had an impact at all 3 of our WKND services, it will have a positive impact on you!
Watch [Acts Pt. 3 - The Miracle Of Suffering](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11982.1.d7e2b819cb162336538163924f028be2): [https://youtube.com/live/eFobXTX3m2k](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11983.1.d0090f623881805ea1bde11050ce2d3f)
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11984.1.dadcf32c756923dd135713a8d4a2a982)
---
Watch [Acts Pt. 2 - The Power Of Being](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11985.1.5b270ef0b59cf9525e10eb314b6b0c5e): [https://youtu.be/MVX8zj3wmzM](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11986.1.989da0661cb361678a1d1a62e8d05a72)
**-Subscribe to[Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11987.1.a5e741e82258697846864e5004232630)'s YouTube page**: [https://clr.cm/9gWE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11988.1.428f201bbc9ac55f2974544d1ba92d3f)
If you missed Acts Pt. 1, you can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/T51S0DLIAIc?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11989.1.d80b0c00fe5d630de68959b71decd4e0)
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11990.1.1338485d648b79cc016d8569d6d5392d)
---
This message is a foundational message to understand the Book of Acts.
We look forward to seeing you this WKND and be sure to invite someone to church!
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11991.1.59e042281c9e7ebcbb9b680514edd543)
---

## Message From Mike Lindell
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11992.1.d1f7b8011bd6708e2aaec568ae26cb87)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11993.1.e8b4b7bcf72a6242d13b29bb42d758c3), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11994.1.dd96e4359ecff95b870048065bc8cf5a).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11995.1.a4dfd8e18380c40001eb8127d344274e) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21135570.11996.1.1169a5f9f499b2d66ac625640e1b90c7)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: Critical Reminder: Vote Tomorrow, May 2nd, for a Better Lincoln
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Make your voice heard and encourage your friends in Lincoln to do the same | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/07a14384f51c/n41kepo7ku-480045?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0a46477878&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Tomorrow, Tuesday, May 2nd, is a crucial day for the city of Lincoln as we cast our votes for Mayor, City Council, Airport Authority, and School Board. If you live in Lincoln, we urge you to exercise your civic duty and vote. If you don't reside in Lincoln but have friends or family who do, please call or text them right now to ensure they head to the polls.

**Our Candidates for Lincoln include:**
✅ Suzanne Geist for Mayor
✅ Taylor Wyatt, Tom Duden, Elina Newman & Wayne Reinwald for City Council
✅ Chris Hove & Chris Stokes for Airport Authority Board
✅ Emmy Pollen, Alaina Brouillette, & Richard Aldag for School Board
---
| [ ](http://)
---
| To find your polling location on where to vote, click here: [https://lcrpballot.com/](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=cfc2bb7303&e=25844e23a8)

The outcomes of these elections could very well be determined by a mere 100 votes or less, making every single ballot cast incredibly important. The differences between the Republican and Democrat candidates are stark, and it's essential to make informed decisions to bring sanity and safety back to our Capitol.

Together, we can create a brighter future for our community.
---
| Sincerely, Chairman Eric Underwood
Nebraska Republican Party
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=34f6517b89&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| P.S. Spread the word! Forward this email to your friends and family in Lincoln and remind them to vote tomorrow, May 2nd. Every vote counts in creating the change our city needs.
---
| | | | | | | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9cb5f8a3fa&e=25844e23a8)
---

subject: Join us at Bourbon & Blazers THIS THURSDAY!
body:
Our Bourbon & Blazers Derby Party is this Thursday, May 4th. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/bourbon-and-blazers-13862238?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

Just to remind you, our Bourbon & Blazers Derby Party is **this Thursday** , May 4th! So get your tickets now and join us as we view races, sip cocktails, and enjoy each other’s company at the beautiful Cherokee Country Club.

To purchase tickets, visit the link [HERE](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=b9bd8dd816&e=cb396c52a2) or go to [lwfaa.com/events](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=3cf928d79a&e=cb396c52a2).

If you're interested in one of the sponsorship levels, visit the link [HERE](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=60d8077b63&e=cb396c52a2) or contact Mallory Whitfield at (404) 583-6081 or [info@lwfaa.com](mailto:info@lwfaa.com).

If you can't attend but would still like to support the organization, you can donate [here](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=8b2b8f618b&e=cb396c52a2).

God Bless,

Kelvin & Janelle King
Co-Chairs | Let’s Win for America Action

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS: Next steps to Raise the Wage state by state, new endorsements, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Medical Debt Survey | RSVP: Medical Debt Kick-Off |Raise the
Wage with US Rep. Schakowsky | Progressive Power in Texas with Teri
Castillo | OR Board Member Jorden Giger for South Bend Council |Bernie
HELP Poster | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230501_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Medical debt is a phrase that should not exist, but it's sadly a fixture
of America's monstrous healthcare system.

Our Revolution is working to eliminate medical debt by going after
hospitals for their aggressive collections practices.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230501_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1012&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]That's why we're asking you to click here and take our medical debt
survey. Share your experiences or what those close to you have been
through. Together, we can end this immoral practice.
★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1013&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Our Revolution is mounting a massive campaign to End Medical Debt, and
we’re teaming up with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our coalition of patient
advocates to do it.

Join our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1014&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]Live National Town Hall on May 8th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT to
hear directly from Our Revolution activists who are bravely speaking out
about their own medical debt and organizing for a cure.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1015&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]RSVP FOR THE TOWN HALL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1016&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders is taking on Big Pharma, union-busters, and other powerful
special interests as the Chairman of the HELP Committee.

If you agree with Bernie that billionaires shouldn't be able to buy
political power, chip in $15 here (or $10 recurring) to help us have his
back and we'll send you this new Bernie HELP poster!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8634?t=1017&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]GET YOUR POSTER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1018&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1019&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

As you know, Our Revolution and One Fair Wage are working hard to raise
wages and end the subminimum wage in cities, counties, and states around
the country. And, as wages go up, we don’t want to leave any group of
workers behind!

On Monday, US Rep. Jan Schakowsky (D-IL) and OFW President Saru Jayaraman
spoke to thousands of Our Revolution supporters on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8636?t=1020&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]National
Organizing Call on the next steps in Illinois, Ohio, and beyond!

Earlier that day, they joined our organizers and worker activists in the
Chicago Loop to call out the National Restaurant Association — the leading
opponent of higher pay for restaurant workers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1021&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

The NYT recently exposed the group’s #ServSafeScam by which it collects
workers’ money through food handling certification and uses it to lobby to
keep their wages low.

“The Restaurant Association should not be taking this money as a
‘not-for-profit’ then spending it as if it was their own and using it to
lobby against fair wages,” Rep. Schakowsky said. “I think we should ask
the IRS to investigate that.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8641?t=1022&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]WATCH REP. SCHAKOWSKY’S CLIP HERE

And now, Saru told us, new info is coming out about the lobby’s push to
weaken child labor laws in order to fill gaps left by thousands of
restaurant workers refusing to work for poverty wages post-pandemic.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1023&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

“We’re hearing stories of 11- and 12-year-olds working,” Saru told us
Monday. “And now, we saw the Iowa Senate bill for minors to handle alcohol
— wholly from the Restaurant Association driving this.”

“As horrible as it is, it’s a sign they’re losing and workers are
winning,” she explained. “They’re resorting to this because adults are
refusing to work for $2 and $3 for the first time since Emancipation when
this wage structure was created.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8645?t=1024&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]WATCH SARU’S CLIP HERE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1025&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

We’re on the winning side! Thanks to your support and activism, our bills
are advancing at the city, county, and state levels across the country.

New Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson — who we helped elect last month! — has
come out in a big way to support our Raise the Wage campaign in the city.
And, US Rep. Schakowsky said the Illinois state legislation looks
promising given the Democrats’ supermajority.

Our organizing work in Maryland is also paying off: “It looks like we'll
have the votes to end the subminimum wage in Prince George’s County,” Saru
said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1026&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

In Chicago this week, IL Rep. Abdelnasser Rashid and Chicago Aldermen and
Cook County Democratic Vice Chair Mike Rodriguez joined us in addressing
the city council to push a city-wide tipped minimum wage ordinance.

And, Our Revolution Field Director Mike Oles and our crew activated our
Raise the Wage Ohio Team at the State House in Columbus on Monday to
launch a new petition for a higher state minimum wage and an end to
subminimum wages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8637?t=1027&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]If you’re in Ohio, sign up for paid and volunteer opportunities in
this exciting initiative here!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1028&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

The subminimum wage invites wage theft, harassment, and discrimination.
Everyone needs a full minimum wage. Our bill now has 33 cosponsors in the
NY Assembly, and it’s time for the Empire State to step up to the plate.

“NY is our biggest fight,” OFW President Saru Jayaraman said. “Our big
action is set for May 8th with lots of great moms and me getting arrested
in the state capitol in advance of Mother’s Day.”

Our joint action with One Fair Wage will be held at 11:30 am May 8th in
Albany, and we have some special guests who will be announced soon!
There’s also a bus traveling from NYC for folks who are interested!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8628?t=1029&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]JOIN US IN ALBANY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1030&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

We’re working hard to pass legislation in 11 states - RI, CA, IL, CO, HI,
PR, MA, AZ, ID, MI, and OH. This fight is national, we’ve got to fight it
in every jurisdiction. Plug in by joining our Raise the Wage Team at the
link below.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1031&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]HELP RAISE THE WAGE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1032&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1033&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

“Our Revolution’s executive director, Joseph Geevarghese, said local
progressive organizing, from mayor to school board, is more effective now
than it has been in decades,” The [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8638?t=1034&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]Associated Press wrote.

Thanks to our members and volunteers, our 400k voter contact operation
helped propel Mayor Brandon Johnson to victory in Chicago and elect a
progressive trifecta to lead St. Louis.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1035&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Now, we’re taking that energy to Philadelphia, where Helen Gym is on the
ballot for Philadelphia Mayor on May 16th- along with progressive city
councilor candidates like Amanda McIllmurray.

A former public school teacher and community activist, Helen said on our
recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8610?t=1036&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]Live Call: “When we win on the ground in our cities, that’s the
blueprint, because we cannot wait for Congress.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1037&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Local races are key to moving the progressive movement forward nationally,
Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8639?t=1038&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]Billy Penn.
“City and local governments are laboratories of policy experimentation,”
he said.

Billy Penn highlighted our work to “turn out progressive super voters in
Philadelphia,” where we’ll be mobilizing our 40k members and making 300k
voter contacts over the next couple of weeks.

“Our theory of change,” Joseph said, “is if we can get that slice of the
electorate out, through multiple contacts, that can be a game changer.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1039&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1040&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

We’re also investing resources to elect a more progressive City Council to
work with Helen, including Amanda McIllmurray — a working-class organizer
who would be the first openly queer Council Member ever in the city.

In 2016, Amanda was working as a nanny, a law firm clerk, and a softball
umpire when she got involved with the Bernie Sanders presidential campaign
and later started organizing for local power.

“I’m running to win good jobs, affordable housing, worker’s rights, and
universal family care,” Amanda said. As the daughter of union members, she
knows “everyone deserves the chance to have just ONE job, a
family-sustaining job.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1041&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Our Revolution Board Member and BLM South Bend Co-founder Jorden Giger is
running for City Council in South Bend, Indiana!

Jorden’s community organizing work has helped secure millions in home
repair for low-income communities, led the city’s first racial wealth
divide study, and provided $400k in rental assistance.

“For six years, we’ve been organizing in South Bend to hold our local
government accountable to our low-income communities, raise wages, win
housing, and rein in tax breaks to the wealthy and well-connected,” Jorden
told us on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8636?t=1042&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]Live Call.

“So we decided to run and now we’ve built this coalition of progressive
champions endorsed by Our Revolution and putting forward a unifying agenda
for the city,” he said

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8646?t=1043&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]WATCH JORDEN SPEAK HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1044&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Early voting has started in Texas, and we’re excited to back community
organizer and San Antonio Council Member Teri Castillo for re-election in
District 5!

Teri helped pass a $17.50 minimum wage in the city and worked with the
community to secure permanent affordable housing measures that passed by
one vote on the council.

“We’re bringing more people into the process for solutions on housing,
workers' rights, development, and more,” she said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8636?t=1045&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]National
Organizing Call on Monday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8644?t=1046&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]WATCH TERI’S CLIP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1047&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Also in San Antonio, Our Revolution is also endorsing Jalen
McKee-Rodriguez for re-election to San Antonio City Council (D-2).

Jalen is a former public school teacher, who is dedicated to housing as a
human right and green building to meet the city’s climate goals.

Election Day is May 6th in Texas! We have to make sure that folks who are
willing to stand up don’t lose their bid for re-election for standing
against powerful interests.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1048&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

We have a chance to build more power in Philadelphia and San Antonio! The
best way to make an impact from anywhere in the country is to sign up to
make calls with our team of volunteers.

We can tip the balance in these key down-ballot races that will have a
direct effect on people’s lives. Help us build local power as part of the
Our Revolution Phonebank Force.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1049&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]PHONEBANK THIS WEEK!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1050&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1051&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1052&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]Live Town Hall to End Medical Debt this Monday, May 8th
at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

We’ll be organizing directly with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our patient
activists, who are bravely speaking out about their medical debt and how
we can cure this sickening injustice in our healthcare system.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1053&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]RSVP FOR THE TOWN HALL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1054&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders is taking on corporate power as the Chairman of the HELP
Committee. To help us have his back, chip in $15 here (or $10 recurring)
and we'll send you this new Bernie HELP poster!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8634?t=1055&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]GET YOUR POSTER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1056&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

The new Our Revolution Store is open! We’ve got lots of new items — from
hoodies to coffee mugs, even a baby onesie! Grab some gear, make a
statement, and help fund the movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1057&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]CHECK OUT OUR STORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1058&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

Join our Elect Progressives Team to grow our influence at the state and
local level, where the policies we pass can change lives and change the
national landscape.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1059&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]HELP BUILD LOCAL POWER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1060&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1061&akid=4235%2E5885482%2EdTz137 ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

body:
I am reaching out to you today with a sense of urgency...
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000187d8adb0b9-11cca813-2850-4736-8b15-e4deeff3c9a1-000000/3kQnA8SCxaprTG10cItzmPMNj1Q=319)

| Friends, I am reaching out to you today with a sense of urgency and a deep concern for the future of our great state. As a lifelong conservative and proven leader, I have dedicated my life to fighting for the values that make Virginia strong: freedom, family, and limited government. And I am counting on your support to help us take back the Virginia Senate in the upcoming Republican firehouse primary. The stakes of this election could not be higher. Our very freedoms, our very way of life, are under attack by the radical left. They want to take away our rights, silence our voices, and force their dangerous agenda on all of us. But we will not back down. We will not be silenced. We will stand up and fight for what we believe in. But we cannot do this alone. We need your help to spread the word and ensure that every conservative voice is heard. Talk to your friends and neighbors, share this email on social media, and encourage everyone you know to vote on May 6th at the designated polling locations. Remember, this is not just an election. This is a battle for the heart and soul of our beloved Virginia. This is a fight for our freedom, our prosperity, and our very way of life. But we can win this fight. We can show the Democrats that Virginia is a conservative state that values our traditions, our families, and our Constitution. So, fellow Republicans, I urge you to stand with me in this critical election. Let us choose the candidate who will fight for our freedoms, our families, and our future. Let us show the world what Virginia stands for. Let us make our voices heard.Thank you for your support, and I look forward to seeing you at the polls on May 6th. Sincerely,
---

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Celebrating May Day with action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
body:
Calling on Congress to support workers' rights

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62632341/404064637/-345890914?refcode=EM_PET_230501MayDay_NB_5_TESTB&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDczNDczNy01NGU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxOmtBKr5jtB4D8kjYuWcsfsBnn0GRdbbXbcSJZd_To=)
Team,

Today we celebrate May Day, or International Workers’ Day, and the monumental accomplishments of the labor movement over the years. As a proud labor advocate, I’ve dedicated my entire career to fighting for workers’ rights, and now I have the privilege of doing that work in Congress.

In my first few months as a Representative, I’ve sponsored bipartisan legislation targeted at strengthening our workforce and expanding opportunities for job seekers. From establishing training and apprenticeship programs to create different avenues towards success to ensuring the next generation of farmers is able to thrive, I’m making real change happen for our working families.

But I can’t do this alone. We’re building broad coalitions with supporters on both sides of the aisle to deliver solutions for America’s workers. [Will you join our fight for working families by calling on other members of Congress to support legislation for workers’ rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62632343/404064640/-453092146?refcode=EM_PET_230501MayDay_NB_5_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDczNDczNy01NGU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxOmtBKr5jtB4D8kjYuWcsfsBnn0GRdbbXbcSJZd_To=&emci=6e2055cb-ece5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f4734737-54e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)
| [SUPPORT WORKERS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62632344/404064642/-453092146?refcode=EM_PET_230501MayDay_NB_5_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDczNDczNy01NGU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxOmtBKr5jtB4D8kjYuWcsfsBnn0GRdbbXbcSJZd_To=&emci=6e2055cb-ece5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f4734737-54e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

Thanks for standing with workers,

Nikki Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62632347/404064643/-345890914?refcode=EM_PET_230501MayDay_NB_5_TESTB_footer&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDczNDczNy01NGU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxOmtBKr5jtB4D8kjYuWcsfsBnn0GRdbbXbcSJZd_To=).

name: Kash Patel
subject: I hope this isn’t too personal
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6c6a48844214edfade230e5cd9bffb9&_e=bW5teSq-yh1_nzYEZi7aLDRZJ8c9HqIpZb7-55kp6tkcmpAUpHNUyrOvzx8u6BLhSFtIkHkR2UTuVeQB0qZW5DktjCfcxYIdN4uXoDXJE2cLhR5tyxBogjXemksAzk1YZY-ty2jwAV22-GaGE5TY_lBd10Bt5Y_W58X1-rYMGv1SWp133jr0DfJZQMK2GQAKn_q2k-KWLrhMrHl1mjYf7IP9G7vqBg03n1fyKt4jQRuOZjmT8OO1tPcT65RYmfOw)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6c6a48844214edfade230e5cd9bffb9&_e=bW5teSq-yh1_nzYEZi7aLDRZJ8c9HqIpZb7-55kp6tkcmpAUpHNUyrOvzx8u6BLhSFtIkHkR2UTuVeQB0qZW5DktjCfcxYIdN4uXoDXJE2c-O9iWxDc9enHZvBdCQX4WXz0j_2RHfipO-jnnTEif_SAyQLjoCadnbFKloSGFjR9Dif0snDCk2vBWLVs7ePtW8iNRHVjyFTCVvT57RCn5xq5j1Y9zGaiaT6Kyo--h2TKxkpvCwDHs0gegG1T_Nrol)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6c6a48844214edfade230e5cd9bffb9&_e=bW5teSq-yh1_nzYEZi7aLDRZJ8c9HqIpZb7-55kp6tkcmpAUpHNUyrOvzx8u6BLhSFtIkHkR2UTuVeQB0qZW5DktjCfcxYIdN4uXoDXJE2dJo0bUErv9c-dgqszBjW1dOUc6MyDMLovu1JNBCDqPaHTCAHBv68y4i-UdB6riMzT_kPfeDMOGJsyF-ATlT1K-f-BC2VXmeXtlIp-SQER-sbhUEaU9NY61csHrMGKyRIXU_15qbryke1suyLiFEJxP)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This could be the end of female athletics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
\
I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5bd8afb5fe44ffe96028d0eca9cf271&_e=anzsaSQRQlWdEUJQ6J7YH79XVbI77hMF8XvftLUaU7dlpEzVqQ2afnHIh0zJEHCRe5hlLXQio749wMECl7f9SDvj6fTiYiuBChZoja4NafU8BhFWmd9J7uiR29hrZo3xueTiMNIr1ms7bTz85RUh0Mg3K3Maqa8I5foswds0QR3uqv4Q9xc242Nd_0rMq0FC-nCT2pl4_VhNdr1OTFUC6Rgpy2xoAsmCjTG0wT5jQdmSU6K8cliTX0T97asiC21uXIQdhw4h8gL2rTtLO8kZY1g_VoaetYLpue8iul64TfVFv8pD5Uaf_0yGdgYSHOKYdWwrfEA-YoNsOJm8gC_r67tFf2Bw3hDGN9SXne26haqiAhp0qjsqAWUFeo2fpuzOIVRv1R4-jjSzNeio3MCB_8vFzHoF7q5OPhMDhg_EmBHzDrzB5kO3GabCBjVAdBS8k8rV_4zj0spr-ZI9SC4QwQ%3D%3D)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5bd8afb5fe44ffe96028d0eca9cf271&_e=anzsaSQRQlWdEUJQ6J7YH79XVbI77hMF8XvftLUaU7dlpEzVqQ2afnHIh0zJEHCRe5hlLXQio749wMECl7f9SDvj6fTiYiuBChZoja4NafU8BhFWmd9J7uiR29hrZo3xueTiMNIr1ms7bTz85RUh0Mg3K3Maqa8I5foswds0QR3uqv4Q9xc242Nd_0rMq0FC-nCT2pl4_VhNdr1OTFUC6Rgpy2xoAsmCjTG0wT5jQdmSU6K8cliTX0T97asiC21uXIQdhw4h8gL2rTtLO8kZY1g_VoaetYLpue8iul64TfVFv8pD5Uaf_0yGdgYSHOKYWshkbAwwu4wxkARv6XKuGoNi5SIZjaAx48wZ2tlXl62rLMM-2S5IC_L4-tCPClxi2-cmMf8GyO1sBa5awvUQLnp2zYL_GCtSPNm2cTjCRBlQj-FABcd9vaP2iQgpwaDwylKeWa7T4UqjgtXVBw2K3g%3D%3D "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

clean_body: \ I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie | | | | | | My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky. After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship. It gets worse: When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the hundredth of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes... My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition. That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports. The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences. The "Party of Women" doesn't support women. Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness. Fortunately, Republicans in the House introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports... So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - "will you stand with me?" If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it... | | | | | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Pro 2A? Urgent Vote for Texas Tomorrow...
body:
Fight back against corporate gun registry

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOT:**
This comes directly from the Texas State Director of Gun Owners of America, Wes Virdell.
We need _**immediate**_ help fighting back against the corporate gun registry.
Recently, the International Organization for Standardization, based in Switzerland, issued a new merchant category code to track firearm transactions.
HB2837 by Rep. Matt Schaefer limits what information payment card issuers, including banks and credit card companies, can track.
This important bill is up for a vote **_TOMORROW_**.
Please **immediately contact your representative** and ask that they **_support_ HB2837** by Rep. Matt Schaefer!
Click on the box below to find out which State Representative represents you and call their office.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: May Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

This May Day, let’s celebrate workers across the country, their struggles,
and their progress by pledging that California's next U.S. Senator will be
a staunch ally of the labor movement.

Our state has been at the center of the labor fight for decades. Just like
the SEIU members I joined on the picket line last month, who drive our
kids to school, feed them lunch, and clean their classrooms, California
workers have always fought to set the standard for a middle-class life in
this country.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230501-may-day-pro-act.xCEgHW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup ]Adam Schiff on the picket line with SEIU members.

I’ve committed my entire career to standing up for California’s workers
and working families. This commitment to workers is why I proudly kicked
off this campaign alongside the brains and brawn behind the Hollywood
Magic at the IATSE union hall in Burbank.

It’s why I’ve picked up statewide endorsements from the CA electrical
workers (the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers) and the CA
transit and allied workers (the Amalgamated Transit Union), as well as
California’s IATSE council. Not to mention another dozen local unions.

Too often, working families and underserved communities are left behind,
leaving only large corporations and the wealthy to benefit from our
country’s economy. We must say no more to this broken system and commit to
supporting workers.

Whether you're a school teacher, a barista, a construction worker, or an
IT technician, you have the right to form a union and collectively bargain
for your wages and benefits.

As California's next Senator, I'll fight to protect that right and
enshrine it further by passing the Protecting the Right to Organize Act,
which helps unionizing workers, providing them protections when bargaining
for better wages, benefits, and safer workplaces.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230501-may-day-pro-act.xCEgHW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup ]Will you stand with workers across California and this country today by
adding your name alongside mine, calling on Congress to pass the
Protecting the Right to Organize Act?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230501-may-day-pro-act.xCEgHW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup ]ADD YOUR NAME

Thank you for stepping up today, and happy May Day!

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230501-may-day-pro-act.xCEgHW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2155%2E5257348%2EnoJJup

subject: NEW: PA’s Democratic House majority is on the line

body:
👀
#
Derek, there’s a major race happening in Pennsylvania that you might not know about. 👀
Polls say that the upcoming May 16th special election for the open 163rd Pennsylvania House seat is too close to call...and the winner will determine whether or not PA Dems hold on to their State House majority!!!
Abortion access is on the line, so you can understand why this close polling data worry us. **Elections in Pennsylvania ALWAYS come down to turnout** — and your donation will make an immediate impact in a race that could be decided by just a few hundred votes.
**[One last big investment in reaching PA-163 voters could literally affect the future of abortion in PA. Will you rush a split donation right now to PA House Democrats + John Fetterman?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230501-1?refcode=em20230501-1-8358&refcode2=8358_434096_ah8W6A&akid=8358%2E434096%2Eah8W6A)**

Thank you for fighting for reproductive freedoms in the Commonwealth.
—Team Fetterman HQ 💛

| | Veterans honor our VA's mission statement "To fulfill President Lincoln's promise to care for those who have served in our nation's military and for their families, caregivers, and survivors." The recent "Limit, Save, Grow Act of 2023," passed by all Republicans and opposed by all Democrats, does not fulfill this mission. It does the very opposite. Defunding veteran services shows the stark contrast between Democrats and Republicans. Twenty-one [Veteran groups](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/92OVM_Zbx/c?w=3jMnF4dXAKs7lk4uPR6nXwp2vJy0nZKGgesADwSgdoU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldmV0cy5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvdm90ZXZldHMtam9pbnMtMjAtdmV0ZXJhbnMtb3Jncy1pbi11cmdpbmctY29uZ3Jlc3MtdG8tcHJvdGVjdC12YS1idWRnZXQiLCJyIjoiMzZjODNiYWYtOTgxYy00ZWNhLTljMGEtZjk3NGE1MDg2YWFhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) sounded the alarm asking for this not to pass Congress. I, Bob Lorinser, candidate for Michigan's 1st Congressional seat, am proud to stand with them. The [22% budget cut](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/92OVM_Zbx/c?w=F_sm7ShPLmOG_JaLhMFOTocJpJO9b5R4_FEjhh9_w_o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmEuZ292L29wYS9wcmVzc3JlbC9wcmVzc3JlbGVhc2UuY2ZtP2lkPTU4NzQiLCJyIjoiMzZjODNiYWYtOTgxYy00ZWNhLTljMGEtZjk3NGE1MDg2YWFhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) to the VA would:
* Threaten Medical Care for Veterans. 30 million fewer Veteran outpatient visits and 81,000 jobs lost across the Veterans Health Administration
* Undermine Access to Telehealth.
* Worsen Wait Times for Benefits by eliminating 6,000 staff of the Veterans Benefits Administration.
* Prevent Construction on the Health Care Facilities that Veterans need. The median VA hospital was built nearly 60 years ago – compared to just 13 years ago in the private sector.
* Fail to Honor the Memory of All Veterans. Delay the opening of 5 new national cemeteries that will serve nearly 1.6 million Veterans.
* Cut Housing for Veterans. Eliminate funding for as many as 50,000 Veterans, putting them at greater risk of homelessness.
* Increase Food Insecurity for Veterans. About 1.3 million Veterans rely on SNAP.
* Deprive Veterans of mental health, substance use, and other health services.
* Eliminate Job Training and Other Supports for Homeless Veterans

Approximately 62,000 Veterans live in northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. We must repay and protect our Veterans and active military members for their service and sacrifices for our country. Outside of the direct harm to Veteran benefits, Veterans would also suffer the consequences all Americans face. [Join my fight](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/92OVM_Zbx/c?w=swR6rPCw27jhXpDywh3dR4M3KHndJUeIIEE3ycpMS58.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3ZhYmQiLCJyIjoiMzZjODNiYWYtOTgxYy00ZWNhLTljMGEtZjk3NGE1MDg2YWFhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) in advocating for Veterans. [Please contribute](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/92OVM_Zbx/c?w=swR6rPCw27jhXpDywh3dR4M3KHndJUeIIEE3ycpMS58.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3ZhYmQiLCJyIjoiMzZjODNiYWYtOTgxYy00ZWNhLTljMGEtZjk3NGE1MDg2YWFhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) to my campaign for Congress so we can elect a Congressperson willing to stand tall against cutting services for Veterans.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We can't afford another Ron Johnson (R-WI) in the Senate. We absolutely must reelect Senator Tammy Baldwin, the great progressive from Wisconsin.
body:
Two of them?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdfe73fac-d1ee-4d97-a0b6-27ed9b4db563/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[We can't afford another Ron Johnson (R-WI) in the Senate. We absolutely must reelect Senator Tammy Baldwin, the great progressive from Wisconsin.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d91ac43-da8a-427f-91de-3d9d63fb6b90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** _Let me remind you about treasonous, bag-of-bricks-for-a-brain Senator Johnson, who took a pilgrimage to Putin on July 4th, 2018, returning repeating Russian talking points like a parrot. A rabid anti-vaxxer, anti-choicer and AR-15 promoter who recently spoke in a hearing about how climate change would be good for the U.S:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07e19eea-b216-4229-bd06-77eb223829c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_An all-around disaster, and worst of all we lost to him by a measly 1% in 2022(!), leaving us stuck with this human waste of space for six more years. 1%!!_** _His polar opposite Tammy Baldwin's up for reelection. Baldwin, the first open Senate lesbian, is a stalwart abortion rights supporter, democracy-defender & gun safety proponent good on every issue from climate change to higher wages._**_ Like Sherrod Brown & Raphael Warnock--a Senator from a purple-to-red state as progressive as blue-state colleagues. We need her courage in the Senate._** **_Republicans are recruiting someone as corrupt, stupid & treasonous as Johnson to take on Baldwin, like former Koch-Bros-owned-Gov. Scott Walker, or GOP governor candidate in 2022, Tim Michels. He said if he were elected governor, Republicans "will never lose another election." There's a word for that. It isn't democracy._** _We can't lose Baldwin's passion, smarts and perspective in the Senate, and can't allow an authoritarian clod to win, or we'll have another Johson in the Senate, doing Putin's bidding while claiming vaccines are deadly and climate change is great._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in giving super-Sen. Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep the progressive purple state Senator in DC fighting for us?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4eff7f8-5b8e-4886-8a45-5063a342feb9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for rejecting Ron-Johnson-type Senators, and fighting to keep their opposites, superb Senators like Tammy Baldwin._ Cliff
