| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T832532ec-415f-4109-ae9f-26ad6bac7ea7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Let me remind you about treasonous, bag-of-bricks-for-a-brain Senator Johnson, who took a pilgrimage to Putin on July 4th, 2018, returning repeating Russian talking points like a parrot. A rabid anti-vaxxer, anti-choicer and AR-15 promoter who recently spoke in a hearing about how climate change would be good for the U.S: An all-around disaster, and worst of all we lost to him by a measly 1% in 2022(!), leaving us stuck with this human waste of space for six more years. 1%!! His polar opposite Tammy Baldwin's up for reelection. Baldwin, the first open Senate lesbian, is a stalwart abortion rights supporter, democracy-defender & gun safety proponent good on every issue from climate change to higher wages. Like Sherrod Brown & Raphael Warnock--a Senator from a purple-to-red state as progressive as blue-state colleagues. We need her courage in the Senate. Republicans are recruiting someone as corrupt, stupid & treasonous as Johnson to take on Baldwin, like former Koch-Bros-owned-Gov. Scott Walker, or GOP governor candidate in 2022, Tim Michels. He said if he were elected governor, Republicans "will never lose another election." There's a word for that. It isn't democracy. We can't lose Baldwin's passion, smarts and perspective in the Senate, and can't allow an authoritarian clod to win, or we'll have another Johson in the Senate, doing Putin's bidding while claiming vaccines are deadly and climate change is great. Thank you for rejecting Ron-Johnson-type Senators, and fighting to keep their opposites, superb Senators like Tammy Baldwin. name: Working Families Party
subject: Workers over profits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Happy May Day, Peter. Today we celebrate and honor the legacy of workers, unions, labor movements, and their hard-fought struggles for better working conditions, including the eight-hour workday, five-hour work week, and more. We also set our sights on a new horizon**** —**** a**** future**** of shared prosperity and universal dignity for workers everywhere. **It’s one reason why this May we’re putting our resources towards electing pro-worker, pro-union champion Helen Gym.** If Helen wins in her race for Philadelphia Mayor in just two weeks, we know she will fight to ensure family-sustaining wages, fair benefits, and safe working conditions are a guarantee for _all_ workers. [**This May Day, help strengthen our movement by splitting a contribution of $10 between Helen Gym’s campaign and WFP. Your contribution will help fuel critical get-out-the-vote efforts in the final two weeks of this race, and make sure Helen’s vision of a Philadelphia that puts workers over profits is heard by undecided voters before Election Day.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1NqJtv4UfD9jvRkRTwpqHxYOiunRvCl4_wIVPWmAntl5seGTartPdT1aAh34hyMjJfYMXsnfj2u2Gl8c8_qmHpn7atE04Ms9p5ZpGG4Z6P4Vzl_uhqMzOkJ1uTt0VxenkvNlBEaxYWrYpAbbafpiO3B96XKgDcYXR9dKf-lXeUyCvtwJuR0hRx0S2Olq6C6TYZYwdcStcNO4msSe2B2OoT6ZXQ9S9v8UqjwvB6uEwvr4yDfGVp3XhN1wmHgZctxSfQC4DNzofJzXiNc2NeVBjQXmOXWhqBTKzIIe3xRJu-_yRXSt2lhLG3pvfP-Eq-08m5XzHeRKZgr07TBCL09BhL4aC1lV5EMGVlR9hmxGqtwB08/3vt/9cxVBuSNQ6SuasMS9SHIlw/h0/ZbyT45T3qw6yXegZ_D9KmY9PXs14zVbSe_EXVaBbnF0) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1NqJtv4UfD9jvRkRTwpqHxYOiunRvCl4_wIVPWmAntl5seGTartPdT1aAh34hyMjJfYoC-xillnOkORYM9hKAMQlEt8Z7Tv9IN7pb91V7NybhV7TLR1-R9w3MqbDb3-8jVODa2lEEjrm9Ji1Lw5fYC99DWWKFuhkqzwWoFqD2KaiqPgBTi-sP1hVy81yxYSxBHB48VBrmM6RxjzkP2rYghebrhNJYXqhZidpII84Piu0W9_LK3rjCiIvVYAhFVNaqdcqMA31W_GBNwOVrZtBblpG856JjrRL9P0nAOAt2FzWVQoD9yXMITSF3Nx3yYWImH-hD8VVCV34ew5kcQ9PERCsgN0p_e48BbcsJcwEZTr3jY/3vt/9cxVBuSNQ6SuasMS9SHIlw/h1/wjv4FrwakuDAT7bDFgC7Sy0C4uP1MGpM42mulUWg1-c)** As a city councilmember, Helen helped establish a permanent Department of Labor in Philadelphia to enforce worker protection laws. She also passed **_the most expansive Fair Workweek Law_** __**_in the country_** to guarantee stable, predictable schedules for over 130,000 hourly workers. And she co-wrote the Black Workers Matter Economic Recovery Package, which required hospitality employers to offer jobs back to thousands of hospitality sector workers who were laid off during the COVID-19 pandemic. There’s no doubt that as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, Helen will continue fighting for workers and their families. But the same can’t be said for her top opponents, some of whom want to end the fair scheduling protections Helen passed for over 130,000 Philadelphia workers as a city councilmember. [**That’s why today we’re asking: Will you rush a contribution of $10 to help turn out voters in these next two weeks and elect former public school teacher, community organizer, and pro-worker clean_body: | | | Happy May Day, Peter. Today we celebrate and honor the legacy of workers, unions, labor movements, and their hard-fought struggles for better working conditions, including the eight-hour workday, five-hour work week, and more. We also set our sights on a new horizon** — a future of shared prosperity and universal dignity for workers everywhere. It’s one reason why this May we’re putting our resources towards electing pro-worker, pro-union champion Helen Gym. If Helen wins in her race for Philadelphia Mayor in just two weeks, we know she will fight to ensure family-sustaining wages, fair benefits, and safe working conditions are a guarantee for all workers. As a city councilmember, Helen helped establish a permanent Department of Labor in Philadelphia to enforce worker protection laws. She also passed the most expansive Fair Workweek Law _in the country to guarantee stable, predictable schedules for over 130,000 hourly workers. And she co-wrote the Black Workers Matter Economic Recovery Package, which required hospitality employers to offer jobs back to thousands of hospitality sector workers who were laid off during the COVID-19 pandemic. There’s no doubt that as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, Helen will continue fighting for workers and their families. But the same can’t be said for her top opponents, some of whom want to end the fair scheduling protections Helen passed for over 130,000 Philadelphia workers as a city councilmember. In solidarity, always, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/AZpL1_4y5sBTFhwB5RQFiA)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ \- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/fBiDMpuZYcuOFAJJrLcMdA)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/rvhUBDmRWOtDjrMXpgMvfQ)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/mrTIArvVZfnqdhIZ0YMdSQ)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country - the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ \- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation's heroes deserve.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/v5rKnl85S4bJIhvxMlf2kg)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/I6fbrWLBSqgAAMHvTclThw)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/Pg3Hm9jyhAyulVO0fBb3kQ) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/cvt91BHmvcioP1c9e0YjRg)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/mLc2FpwmR7oX4xk-SP21gw)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzgyNzgifQ/LIM-8vSoKBq5VwuU7gnykA)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTIxLTEzYzY5ODVkODUxNzQzZWU4ZjkzMTBhMjkyMDBmNzJlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/X0---Su6ytqvmi0MYvyGsw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: David Trone
subject: Join me in congratulating Senator Cardin for his service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc
body:
Peter,

Earlier today, Senator Ben Cardin announced his intent to retire at the end of his term. Throughout his five decades in public service, Senator Cardin has consistently delivered for the people of Maryland. His passionate efforts have brought jobs and opportunities to underserved communities and improved the lives of millions of families in Maryland and all across the nation.

For his entire career in politics, Senator Cardin has successfully fought for change for working families, small businesses, and the environment. His hard work on securing health care for Americans, including his fight for the Patients' Bill of Rights and dental care access for children, has improved the lives of so many.

As a fellow Marylander, I have had the privilege of witnessing Senator Cardin's dedication and hard work firsthand. I have seen how he has brought people together, forged bipartisan alliances, and worked diligently to find solutions to the most pressing challenges facing our state and our country. His leadership will be missed, but his impact will be felt for generations to come.

Please join me in signing a card congratulating Senator Cardin on his remarkable career and thanking him for his service to our great state!

SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD FOR SENATOR CARDIN >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/W4HCDH-aREu5x8xrgMOqAA2

Sincerely,
David Trone
Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc.
David Trone For Congress
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/UMe6s_cVjEy2S-OBH1JVwA2?unsubscribedata=qQ5bA6aU7bWzM4KLfu%2FHMHbduZ%2FBqNPutFzaoUe6gWT0PzlmmUhF5ONNO5UWIavLGRkWEkXSB4x%2F6bZ4D6Bf1DbCpDAu27hT1nKNB2dnKXMvqW1L5Wcx%2Fmck7wYv3wwWHz2BZ6%2FoYwo7N1mbrY3t1evBP%2FU9WfDIChEtGF8MHLjslOQJql9hM2RjDolHUmMAGWjWYaOYAkinHvGImhpe8I44cA5SWnZpka3Vy3oy4jVtDB2U%2FKzAIRgMe7VQoesdaMBtQlkZl7WTdNIU5OrYuHRK2I2t9gSRc7sVsH7gIA7LiYEPUnLWl6%2FXRv9x%2FKstPz9mJXZ%2BgTk73769bBQn4JHilg%2B6ttwUt5kqwy9e4HdcURNhViWz18d%2B8EETdlFVpg8hx06b6kOmMQkTQkKpijO19%2FVez65kZGh9%2FPYCm4hnGrVf4%2BmQlUwWIrXhkff9 .

subject: Judicial Watch and CatholicVote Sue FBI and Justice Department for Records of Targeting Catholics
body:

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit along with CatholicVote Civic Action against the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) and the Department of Justice for records containing keywords and records about an FBI intelligence memo targeting ‘radical traditionalist’ Catholics. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 1, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit along with CatholicVote Civic Action against the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) and the Department of Justice for records containing keywords and records about an FBI intelligence memo targeting ‘radical traditionalist’ Catholics. ---|--- | | | | | “The Biden administration’s National Archives is hiding almost every record it has about its manufactured records dispute with President Trump,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. ---|--- | | | | | As part of its environmental justice drive, the Biden administration is spending $1 billion dollars to increase equitable access to trees and green spaces in disadvantaged urban communities around the nation. The costly initiative will increase urban tree cover, boost equitable access to nature and tackle the climate crisis, according to an announcement issued by the administration this month. ---|--- | | | | | Besides condoning record-breaking illegal immigration (2.4 million migrants in fiscal year 2022), the Biden administration is quietly protecting hundreds of thousands of foreign nationals who for years have lived in the U.S. illegally by multiplying a program designed to offer temporary reprieve. The provisional amnesty is known as Temporary Protected Status (TPS), a humanitarian measure designed to shield undocumented aliens from deportation during emergencies. ---|--- | | | Fox News The Justice Department and FBI are facing a lawsuit from a Catholic lobbying group for allegedly failing to comply with a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request about a memo that originated from an FBI field office that labeled Catholics as “violent extremists.” Arizona Daily Independent Maricopa County taxpayers have been billed more than $91,000 so far to have former Justice Ruth McGregor investigate why several Ballot of Demand (BOD) printers performed inadequately on Election Day last November. But two of the invoices contained math errors which led to an overbilling of $1,055. The New York Post At least four other past or present leaders at Open Society Foundations have amassed a combined 33 private meetings and other confabs in less than two years, according to recently updated White House visitor logs. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

# **Trump: "We'll get something done" on abortion**
This past Thursday, Trump announced that if he were to win the 2024 presidential election, he would move forward with a nation-wide abortion ban. Donald Trump has made his stance on abortion crystal clear: he is staunchly anti-choice and has voiced his intention to implement a national ban on abortion if given the opportunity. **We have already seen numerous attempts to restrict and ban abortion in our Commonwealth, and the threat of a national ban would be catastrophic for Virginian women and families.** We must do the work to keep abortion legal in Virginia — that means taking the majority in the General Assembly in 2023 and keeping Trump out of office in 2024. name: =?utf-8?B?QnJldHQgQnJvZXNkZXIsIFRvbW9ycm934oCZcyBKb2Jz?=
subject: About our fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tomorrow's Jobs, TomorrowsJobs
body:
|
---
Peter —

**Tomorrow’s Jobs is the only organization solely focused on recruiting, training, and financially supporting Democrats with entrepreneurial backgrounds who are running for office.**

Candidates with professional entrepreneurial backgrounds uniquely connect with independent and persuadable voters thanks to their focused experience creating jobs, building businesses, and investing in communities.

_These candidates know what it takes to successfully navigate a complex regulatory environment, can think outside the box, and know what it takes to get things done._

For the 2023-24 election cycle, we’re working to win back the House Majority; recruit and train entrepreneurial Democrats to run at the state, county, and local levels; and combat the anti-entrepreneur and anti-small business sentiment that Republicans have tried to slap Democrats with nationwide.

subject: Press Release, Supreme Court Ruling Elections were mishandled in Alaska
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D645056109df8fa55c44bc985%26ss_email_id%3D64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165%26ss_campaign_name%3DPress%2BRelease%252C%2BSupreme%2BCourt%2BRuling%2BElections%2Bwere%2Bmishandled%2Bin%2BAlaska%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-05-02T00%253A33%253A30Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_645056109df8fa55c44bc985&l=en-US&s=_YgqCQHiDutpXrHWh5a58kbWnQM%3D)
---
|
## **Press Release:**
**House Bill 4: Repeal Ranked Choice Voting** Tuesday The House State Affairs Committee will hold a hearing on HB 4, which would repeal rank choice voting (RCV) and Open Primaries. Details below to call in to provide public testimony. We want to make sure people have realistic expectations, the Alaska Senate will most likely not vote on any Repeal of Ranked Choice Voting, so even if the House advances this, it will not be successful. Our petition is independent of the legislature and the best option to Repeal Ranked Choice Voting.When: Tuesday May 2nd, 2023 Starting at 3pmBy Phone: 1-844-586-9085 **Signature Gathering Update:** Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected more than half of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 880 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 132,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. **Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot** Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling.
#### “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young”
“The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.” BY: [JAMES BROOKS](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2Fauthor%2Fjames-brooks%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_645056109df8fa55c44bc985&l=en-US&s=gVPgbIUcRr0FG5wca0-zFvMB7gQ%3D "Posts by James Brooks") \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon [https://alaskabeacon.com/2023/04/28/al-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says/](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2F2023%2F04%2F28%2Fal-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_645056109df8fa55c44bc985&l=en-US&s=mE3d-AGAMvHxIGTCGKllb3nkWXk%3D) **Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting** We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)**Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting.**
---
#### **You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count.**
---
**We will have more signing opportunities all year, we are hoping to have all of the petition books turned in by August 31st, the signature verification process will take time and we want to make sure to we the correct amount of signatures in every district.**
---
#### **Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!!
Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**

#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D645056109df8fa55c44bc985%26ss_email_id%3D64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165%26ss_campaign_name%3DPress%2BRelease%252C%2BSupreme%2BCourt%2BRuling%2BElections%2Bwere%2Bmishandled%2Bin%2BAlaska%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-05-02T00%253A33%253A30Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_645056109df8fa55c44bc985&l=en-US&s=geIGnMQv1EHHM8ijmqhoE6I1Us8%3D)
---
#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
---
|
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D645056109df8fa55c44bc985%26ss_email_id%3D64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165%26ss_campaign_name%3DPress%2BRelease%252C%2BSupreme%2BCourt%2BRuling%2BElections%2Bwere%2Bmishandled%2Bin%2BAlaska%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-05-02T00%253A33%253A30Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_645056109df8fa55c44bc985&l=en-US&s=1DUtGAPsYYxzQuIhwU82e_fp26g%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64505a4f1e6da27c325c3165&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_645056109df8fa55c44bc985&l=en-US&s=wsnPuD9c5WQDle4_QvXdoJYfUbA%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Election day is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, It’s almost here. Tomorrow is Election Day across our great state and municipal elections are on the ballot. [**If you currently live in Indiana, make sure you are set to vote by going to IndianaVoters.com where you can find information about your registration.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62635213/404077330/2120319247?refcode=230501-Eday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTFmZGU2MS01ZmU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wFr7JcecIKS2o23SdDqK3j2o56P8YWUksJk6ga_oyTU=&emci=47c3822a-54e8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=991fde61-5fe8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) When it comes to voting, it’s important to have a plan. That means doing background research on the candidates, and making sure that you are voting for people who are invested in you and your community's future. It’s also smart to double check your poll location and to make sure that you’re able to get there during the hours that it is in operation. [**At the Indiana Democratic Party, we are working around the clock to get out the vote and can use your support as we make this final push. You can support our mission by making a contribution here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62635214/404077331/1643342139?refcode=230501-Eday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTFmZGU2MS01ZmU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wFr7JcecIKS2o23SdDqK3j2o56P8YWUksJk6ga_oyTU=) Your time, effort, and donations all go towards making sure that we have people that will fight for us and for our freedoms, no matter what. When we all come together, we can build the movement that will deliver a stronger, safer Indiana for all of us. Now, don’t forget to vote! Thanks,
Indiana Democratic Party | | | [Chip in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62635215/404077332/405560545?refcode=230501-Eday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTFmZGU2MS01ZmU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wFr7JcecIKS2o23SdDqK3j2o56P8YWUksJk6ga_oyTU=)

clean_body: | Peter, It’s almost here. Tomorrow is Election Day across our great state and municipal elections are on the ballot. When it comes to voting, it’s important to have a plan. That means doing background research on the candidates, and making sure that you are voting for people who are invested in you and your community's future. It’s also smart to double check your poll location and to make sure that you’re able to get there during the hours that it is in operation. = Your time, effort, and donations all go towards making sure that we have people that will fight for us and for our freedoms, no matter what. When we all come together, we can build the movement that will deliver a stronger, safer Indiana for all of us. Now, don’t forget to vote! Thanks, Indiana Democratic Party | | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

body:

| |

| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1844be47220a4ef78b525f0e0d71e0b1&_e=_tiWWKsi2OyCjmWrJmmrJKMC68gLYjKjHxXsMbzfDkyjz_np9K0NHjktIBm08dGaVMdzad34T8SFCmQRUYq6JxJqSKm_JHmbs5v1wvzkHtffIPI2FkXxVPlniyt6H-fi-wqdpqpUZswk5RQFKgQR6Cg_n1L2zCrDvCumyfGvHWl4TFahuXvQI0SU0hOS_SeoCnC1q7Mq5quCMdbh9lPjkCa5xERlq64vjdLUrZRmc1p1uqXbN4pJEH_t1R7xQmR4o88aFMr2j2cp4wUbUGwxLTDgVZ-7TKe1UIvMDEZiTP8i920Xdh585CxZCAXb_7wq41rB1wO6Ncs-aqWLcHFeXgnX_aAl4e-yXv5n-J2VjlpWm-YQYIDv_TqHXBoWR6xAaxL87JeLa-WZhMN_YSdn10nJi4w6zxy2c9jnAR-jKYiZ5K0Ru145Ap2UVYn-4TjVeGVrsiGQI0mPvYOZn0g3cw%3D%3D)

It's Jim Jordan.

For too long, Democrats' ROGUE agencies have ABUSED their power to INTIMIDATE and SILENCE their political adversaries & everyday Americans.

_They SPY on our campaigns ...
They CENSOR our voices...
They HARASS concerned parents...
They TARGET America First patriots like YOU...
& they INDICTED President Trump!_

Now: Democrats are FURIOUS.

Now that House Republicans are finally uncovering their corruption and working to DRAIN the Swamp, the Democrat money machine is working overtime to silence us yet again. They will do ANYTHING to stop us.

And if they succeed, our work will all be for nothing. They will get away with their schemes, and continue to weaponize the federal government against conservatives.
**So, I 'm humbly asking: if you support our efforts to drain the swamp, please consider chipping in just $10 or $25 to make sure we can finish the job.**

name: Team AOC
subject: What’s happening in Philadelphia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Helen Gym needs our support.
#
Down in Philly, something remarkable is happening.
Helen Gym, a community organizer, teacher, and former City Councilmember, is running an insurgent mayoral campaign against self-funding millionaires and the entrenched political establishment — **and with two weeks left, a poll shows she’s in a statistical 3-way tie to win.**
[Can you chip in today to support Helen’s campaign in the final stretch?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230501-helen.Y7iA5d&refcode=em20230501-4255-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4255%2E2526796%2EJzDZz-)
For over 30 years, Helen has stood up to the status quo and delivered results. When schools were understaffed and water fountains had lead in them, she stepped up to guarantee safe drinking water, nurses, and counselors in every school.
When low-wage workers were being exploited, she passed legislation to guarantee reliable schedules.
And when Philly had one of the highest rates of eviction in the country, Helen passed legislation that cut evictions by 70%.
[We’re proud to support Helen Gym for mayor because she’s running to return power where it belongs — in the hands of the community. Donate today to push Helen over the finish line on May 16!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230501-helen.Y7iA5d&refcode=em20230501-4255-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4255%2E2526796%2EJzDZz-)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230501-helen.Y7iA5d&refcode=em20230501-4255-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4255%2E2526796%2EJzDZz-)**
**Just last week, a dark money PAC started running attack ads against Helen.** Like Helen, Alexandria has also faced attacks from right-wing billionaires who want to close our schools, criminalize our youth, and deport our neighbors, all while lining their own pockets.
But both Alexandria and Helen know that **our power lies in our connections to each other** , and that a burgeoning people-powered movement from Philly to New York to Chicago and beyond is going to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long.
It will take all of us fighting together, in every city and in every corner of this country, to win the future we deserve — a future where housing is a human right, immigrant families are welcomed, workers are protected, and our communities are safe and vibrant.
[It’s leaders like Helen who will help make that vision a reality.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230501-helen.Y7iA5d&refcode=em20230501-4255-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4255%2E2526796%2EJzDZz-)
Onwards,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230501-helen?refcode=em20230501-4255-P_FND_ANO_END&t=23&refcode2=4255_2526796_JzDZz-&akid=4255%2E2526796%2EJzDZz-)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230501-4255-P_FND_ANO_END&t=24&akid=4255%2E2526796%2EJzDZz-)**

clean_body: Helen Gym needs our support. Down in Philly, something remarkable is happening. Helen Gym, a community organizer, teacher, and former City Councilmember, is running an insurgent mayoral campaign against self-funding millionaires and the entrenched political establishment — and with two weeks left, a poll shows she’s in a statistical 3-way tie to win. - For over 30 years, Helen has stood up to the status quo and delivered results. When schools were understaffed and water fountains had lead in them, she stepped up to guarantee safe drinking water, nurses, and counselors in every school. When low-wage workers were being exploited, she passed legislation to guarantee reliable schedules. And when Philly had one of the highest rates of eviction in the country, Helen passed legislation that cut evictions by 70%. - - Just last week, a dark money PAC started running attack ads against Helen. Like Helen, Alexandria has also faced attacks from right-wing billionaires who want to close our schools, criminalize our youth, and deport our neighbors, all while lining their own pockets. But both Alexandria and Helen know that our power lies in our connections to each other , and that a burgeoning people-powered movement from Philly to New York to Chicago and beyond is going to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long. It will take all of us fighting together, in every city and in every corner of this country, to win the future we deserve — a future where housing is a human right, immigrant families are welcomed, workers are protected, and our communities are safe and vibrant. - Onwards, Team AOC - | - ---|--- - | - | - ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Happy Workers' Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

I've spent my life fighting for Ohioans and for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live or what kind of work you do. The belief that no one should have to work a second or third job _just to get by_. The belief that folks who play by the rules deserve to retire with dignity.
When we fight for workers, we fight for all people. So whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, you work for tips or for a salary, you're raising children or caring for an aging parent – I promise to fight for you.
**But I'll be honest: I can't win this fight alone, friend. I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and I need your grassroots support to help me defend this seat.[That's why I'm personally asking: Will you pitch in $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio, protect our Senate majority and keep fighting for the Dignity of Work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62636896/404082315/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGIyZGFkOS02M2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ITw8WVEiHcNYJwf2Lr_DcbmU9BWBSA36F7K046z2oeI=)**

I grew up in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. But I watched as jobs were shipped overseas, savings were lost and hopes for a comfortable retirement were dashed – all as health care and prescription drug costs skyrocketed. I'm running for reelection to tackle these critical issues and make sure that our country not just recognizes – but _celebrates –_ the Dignity of Work.
But here's why I'm worried: **Experts at _CNN_ say that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and ****Washington Republicans are already launching misleading attack ads against me. I'm a TOP target for defeat, because the battle for Senate control could all come down to what happens in Ohio. So, I have to ask:**
**[Please, friend, can I count on you to chip in $5 – or any amount that is meaningful to you – so we can win this race and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62636898/404082317/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk115-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGIyZGFkOS02M2U4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ITw8WVEiHcNYJwf2Lr_DcbmU9BWBSA36F7K046z2oeI=)**
With gratitude,

Sherrod

* * *

Hi there,

I ran for Congress to deliver for my hometown and communities in mid-Michigan. That’s why last Congress I passed new laws to lower out-of-pocket costs on prescription drugs, protect our Great Lakes, and bring back good-paying manufacturing jobs from China.

**We can get important work done together when we lower the temperature in Washington and focus on issues that really matter to American families. That’s what I’ve always done, and what I’ll always strive to do.**

Last year, we won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district thanks to generous support from folks like you. You helped financially support and volunteer for our campaign which allowed us to make key early investments in the race — and that made all the difference.

Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing. Already, major attack ads have been launched against me—a clear reminder that we’re in for another tough race.

**[That’s why we’re extending our Team Kildee membership drive for only one more day today. Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. clean_body: | TEAM KILDEE MEMBERSHIP DRIVE EXTENDED THROUGH MIDNIGHT = Hi there, I ran for Congress to deliver for my hometown and communities in mid-Michigan. That’s why last Congress I passed new laws to lower out-of-pocket costs on prescription drugs, protect our Great Lakes, and bring back good-paying manufacturing jobs from China. We can get important work done together when we lower the temperature in Washington and focus on issues that really matter to American families. That’s what I’ve always done, and what I’ll always strive to do. Last year, we won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district thanks to generous support from folks like you. You helped financially support and volunteer for our campaign which allowed us to make key early investments in the race — and that made all the difference. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing. Already, major attack ads have been launched against me—a clear reminder that we’re in for another tough race. = = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

1️⃣ EMILYs List has endorsed some incredible Democratic pro-choice women at the state and local level with elections happening _this month_! Mayor **Leirion Gaylor Baird (Lincoln, NE)** is on the ballot _tomorrow_ , May 2, and our support right now can help her cross the finish line. And later this month (5/16), we can help pro-choice champion **Heather Boyd (HD-163)** in a _special election_ to protect the Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania state House!

2️⃣ We've already begun rolling out our slates of House and Senate incumbent and challenger endorsements and, as always, there are more to come! These fiercely pro-choice candidates are integral to securing Democratic majorities and protecting abortion access at the national level — so check your inbox for more updates soon!

3️⃣ May is also **Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Month!** Over nearly four decades, EMILYs List has endorsed scores of Democratic pro-choice women, and we're proud to have helped AAPI women smash glass ceilings and make history nationwide. We hope you'll join us in celebrating the groundbreakers and history-makers that have brought much-needed representation to every level of office. ****We're thrilled to have you on the team, Peter, and can't wait to tell you more about what's in store this month. clean_body: | | | & we're thrilled to have you on the team → Peter, we're kicking off the month of May strong! We have a big month ahead, with elections (as soon as tomorrow!), endorsements in the House and Senate, and important heritage and awareness dates on the calendar! 1️⃣ EMILYs List has endorsed some incredible Democratic pro-choice women at the state and local level with elections happening this month! Mayor Leirion Gaylor Baird (Lincoln, NE) is on the ballot tomorrow , May 2, and our support right now can help her cross the finish line. And later this month (5/16), we can help pro-choice champion Heather Boyd (HD-163) in a special election to protect the Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania state House! 2️⃣ We've already begun rolling out our slates of House and Senate incumbent and challenger endorsements and, as always, there are more to come! These fiercely pro-choice candidates are integral to securing Democratic majorities and protecting abortion access at the national level — so check your inbox for more updates soon! 3️⃣ May is also Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Month! Over nearly four decades, EMILYs List has endorsed scores of Democratic pro-choice women, and we're proud to have helped AAPI women smash glass ceilings and make history nationwide. We hope you'll join us in celebrating the groundbreakers and history-makers that have brought much-needed representation to every level of office. **We're thrilled to have you on the team, Peter, and can't wait to tell you more about what's in store this month. Donate now to help EMILYs List continue endorsing, electing, and uplifting Democratic pro-choice women everywhere: Thank you so much, the EMILYs List team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: CaucusRoom
subject: Will Biden Bankrupt America?
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-quhdydd-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-j/) **Will Biden Bankrupt America?** **[The National Debt is about to hit another major milestone](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-t/), **after doubling over the last ten years. **Migrant on the Run in Texas** **[A suspect on the run in Texas after allegedly killing five neighbors](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-i/) **execution-style Friday night has been deported from the country five times. **Colorado Children are NOT Safe** Colorado Democrats**[voted against a measure that would increase penalties for indecent exposure](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-d/) **because it would have transgender people and drag shows. **How Will This Work?** California Air Resources Board has **[approved a new rule that will ban diesel trucks by 2036. ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-h/) **_How will produce transported to other states arrive before it rots?_ **He Supports Women** **[Robert F. Kennedy Jr](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-k/) **will face another roadblock to becoming the Democrat nominee **[because of his unpopular beliefs on this topic](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-u/). **_He can probably also tell you what a woman is. _

**Out in the Cold** New York is on the verge of **[being the first state to ban natural gas](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-o/).** **New Ad for DeSantis** A GOP Super PAC **[highlights DeSantis' accomplishments](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-x/)** in their new ad titled 'Winning.'** **_I saw the ad when I was in South Carolina last week._ **Great Interview with Musk** Elon Musk explained to HBO host Bill Maher **[why he believes the"woke mind virus" poses an existential threat to civilization](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-m/)**, citing threats to merit and free speech. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* Woman to **[woman](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-q/).**
* **[Words](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-a/) **to live by.
* **[Rare photo](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-f/)** from the 70s.
* **[Fact Check](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-z/)**.

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-v/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quhdydd-trhiujldw-yd/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-quhdydd-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-yk) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-quhdydd-trhiujldw-yu/)

clean_body: It's going to endanger our prospects of retaking the Senate | We've got good news...but mostly bad news. | We failed to reach our April fundraising goal. We let Ohio GOP Senate Candidate Matt Dolan down. We fell just $672 short of our monthly goal, and we're upset that we let him and the rest of Ohio down. Our team is activating a 300% EMERGENCY MATCH on all donations before midnight to make up ground. We are going to TRIPLE the impact of every donation. That way, we can catch up and meet our goals! This is the first time we 've ever done this. You have to make sure you take advantage of the triple match now. We may never be able to offer this opportunity again, so don't wait!!! Thank you, Senate GOP Alerts PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: New Hampshire Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: If we win vs. if we lose…
body:

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. name: Kim Nguyen
subject: celebrating workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | First, I want to say how grateful I am to everyone who joined Team Nguyen during our membership drive last month. Everything you’re doing to support our grassroots movement helps us build a winning campaign to deliver real leadership to CA-45.

**Today, we’re celebrating International Workers’ Day by showing solidarity with workers across the country and around the world.**

The same people who grow, harvest, and serve our food; who build everything in our houses, including the houses themselves; who take care of us in hospitals and at home; who teach in our classrooms and take care of our schools; who keep our country moving in auto manufacturing, airports, and transportation roles across the board – all of these are the same people who helped deliver workers’ rights victories that we all benefit from.

**I’m proudly endorsed by the Los Angeles/Orange County Building & Construction Trades Council, the International Union of Painters & Allied Trades District Council 36, and the United Association of Refrigeration Fitters, Steamfitters, and Welders Local 250.**

These labor leaders know that I will _always_ put working families first in Congress. As union membership rises across the country, I’m committed to fighting alongside workers to make sure corporate executives are held accountable and no one is allowed to put profits over people.

[If you’re with us, please sign on as a Digital Endorser today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62639591/404090229/571418843?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_WL_230501_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2FmNGE2YTQtNmRlOC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aPM9GveUuF_6EXJINAmJJRc76MYBkgE9Pgushk6opTQ=&emci=d66ddf08-5de8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7af4a6a4-6de8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)

Thanks so much,

Kim

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Tell Trader Joe's: Stop union-busting!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
[**Tell Trader Joe's: STOP union busting!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62639678/404090401/1219389703?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230428_15%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDU0ZGNhYi02ZGU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DX4AcBneHfJ0yzrY6SLzG_VQGfXohupdsX0cWZ6fw24=&emci=3bb6d0f9-06e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1454dcab-6de8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)

When I worked paycheck to paycheck, there were days the only thing I could eat were a 20 cent banana and a free sample coffee from Trader Joe’s.

I**’** ve felt the sting of a broken economic system. Everyone who works full time deserves dignity and freedom from hunger ... including workers at Trader Joe’s.

Crew members at 4 stores have voted to unionize with Trader Joe’s United, and instead of bargaining with workers, Trader Joe’s is trying to bust the union.

**[I’m running for Congress to raise wages and strengthen worker’s rights. Stand with my campaign and sign on: tell Trader Joe’s to stop union busting!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62639679/404090402/1219389703?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230428_15%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDU0ZGNhYi02ZGU4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DX4AcBneHfJ0yzrY6SLzG_VQGfXohupdsX0cWZ6fw24=&emci=3bb6d0f9-06e6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1454dcab-6de8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

Trader Joe’s workers have filed unfair labor practice complaints, alleging that management has fired and harassed organizing workers.

Similar union-busting has happened at many companies, but our current laws don’t protect workers enough.

I support the PRO Act, which will include real enforcement that protects workers who want to form a union, and eases the path to collective bargaining.

And, I support a nationwide $15 minimum wage, to ensure no full-time worker lives in poverty.

**[My campaign for Congress stands with workers. clean_body: When I worked paycheck to paycheck, there were days the only thing I could eat were a 20 cent banana and a free sample coffee from Trader Joe’s. I’ ve felt the sting of a broken economic system. Everyone who works full time deserves dignity and freedom from hunger ... including workers at Trader Joe’s. Crew members at 4 stores have voted to unionize with Trader Joe’s United, and instead of bargaining with workers, Trader Joe’s is trying to bust the union. Trader Joe’s workers have filed unfair labor practice complaints, alleging that management has fired and harassed organizing workers. Similar union-busting has happened at many companies, but our current laws don’t protect workers enough. I support the PRO Act, which will include real enforcement that protects workers who want to form a union, and eases the path to collective bargaining. And, I support a nationwide $15 minimum wage, to ensure no full-time worker lives in poverty. Thanks for your support, Derek Marshall = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Kyrsten Sinema thinks very little of you
body:
Kyrsten Sinema said regular people like you can’t make a difference | | | Peter – Kyrsten Sinema knows she’s losing this Senate race. Badly. That’s why she’s popped her head up for a few glossy magazine profiles lately. Most of what she’s said is predictable. But one thing is just outrageous. Look at this quote she gave to The Atlantic magazine: **“You can make a poster and stand out on the street, but at the end of the day all you have is sunburn. You didn't move the needle. You didn't make a difference.’”** So basically...if you’ve ever joined a protest or a march, if you’ve ever signed a petition, if you’ve ever stood up for the causes you believe in, Sinema doesn’t think you’ve accomplished much. **_She must think you’re an idiot for even being on this email list._** In Sinema’s world, we guess the only way to “make a difference” is by selling out to Wall Street and forgetting about all the little people who helped get you where you are. Like all those hardworking volunteers who held “Sinema for Senate” posters back in 2018. **Well, don’t worry Kyrsten. clean_body: Kyrsten Sinema said regular people like you can’t make a difference | | | Peter – Kyrsten Sinema knows she’s losing this Senate race. Badly. That’s why she’s popped her head up for a few glossy magazine profiles lately. Most of what she’s said is predictable. But one thing is just outrageous. Look at this quote she gave to The Atlantic magazine: “You can make a poster and stand out on the street, but at the end of the day all you have is sunburn. You didn't move the needle. You didn't make a difference.’” So basically...if you’ve ever joined a protest or a march, if you’ve ever signed a petition, if you’ve ever stood up for the causes you believe in, Sinema doesn’t think you’ve accomplished much. She must think you’re an idiot for even being on this email list. In Sinema’s world, we guess the only way to “make a difference” is by selling out to Wall Street and forgetting about all the little people who helped get you where you are. Like all those hardworking volunteers who held “Sinema for Senate” posters back in 2018. Well, don’t worry Kyrsten. We won’t make that mistake again. name: Katie Porter
subject: Latest bank failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Congress should pass my bill to protect consumers.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22159%2E3422442%2E-SX8rB)
NEW: First Republic Bank was taken over by the FDIC and sold to JPMorgan Chase overnight.
**These recent bank failures were avoidable.** So after the Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank collapses in March, I introduced two bills. One would impose guardrails that help prevent collapses like this one. The other would clawback compensation from executives who make millions while overseeing a bank failure.
But even after the first two failures, Congress failed to act on either of these bills.
We _know_ how to help prevent bank collapses. After the 2008 financial crisis, Congress passed legislation to require banks to hold onto more liquid cash. This thicker cushion lowered the risk for consumers—but it wasn’t ideal for the banks, which want to invest as much as possible to earn more profit.
Wall Street lobbied to reverse these consumer protections ever since. In 2016, a group of Senators pushed to allow medium-sized banks, like Silicon Valley Bank, to hold onto less liquid cash. I wasn’t yet in Congress, but as a consumer protection attorney I sounded the alarm that this was a dangerous move that put people’s money at risk. **In the end, Congress—in a bipartisan vote—caved to Wall Street and loosened our nation’s banking laws.**
Banking inherently involves risk, but when bank executives recklessly endanger customers' deposits, they must be held accountable. Capitalism needs guardrails to deliver a strong, stable, globally competitive economy that works for working people.
**I’ll keep pushing my colleagues to stand up to Wall Street and protect consumers.**
**Our campaign doesn’t take a dime from Wall Street CEOs. I’m the only person in the race who has taken this pledge. I don’t want Wall Street’s money.** I’m running for the U.S. Senate because we need leaders willing to stand up to lobbyists and corporations and fight for the people we represent. [**Can you join our team today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230501-1?refcode=EMAH01_1_BAN_20230501_V1_F&refcode2=22159_3422442_-SX8rB&akid=22159%2E3422442%2E-SX8rB)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230501-1?refcode=EMAH01_1_BAN_20230501_V1_F&refcode2=22159_3422442_-SX8rB&akid=22159%2E3422442%2E-SX8rB)**
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH01_1_BAN_20230501_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22159_3422442_-SX8rB&akid=22159%2E3422442%2E-SX8rB)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=22159%2E3422442%2E-SX8rB)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=22159%2E3422442%2E-SX8rB)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

clean_body: We’re about to make a complete mockery of Biden’s launch month! | | | Friend, There’s still time to CRUSH Crooked Joe Biden’s 2024 re-election campaign before it even gets off the ground. After all the support that grassroots patriots like YOU showed President Trump and our incredible movement at last night’s end-of-month deadline, we had to ask ourselves: How high can we continue to SURGE? So, our team decided to put in place an internal extension of 1 MORE HOUR before we record our April fundraising numbers. Don’t let this opportunity go to waste, Friend. With your support, we can OUTRAISE Biden and Kamala at the final hour and make a complete mockery of their campaign’s launch month! | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Luckily, Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth have stepped up over the last few days to help us send a message that they're ready to re-elect Andy! Peter, we have momentum, and we're so close to reaching our filing deadline goal. But with just a few hours left, we can't slow down now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = Peter – it's important that we finish this reporting period strong. We need to be ready with the resources necessary to take on whichever opponent comes out on top on May 16 and fight back against the outside money that has begun to flood our Commonwealth to sway this race! Experts say this will be THE most competitive race in the entire country this year, so we need to ensure we have the resources for the tough fight ahead. = Thanks, Peter! Team Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

name: Joe Kent
subject: I'll fly you to Washington State for our event with Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Peter,
On Saturday, July 1st, my campaign is holding a gala in Lake Tapps, Washington State. My special guest for this event is Congressman Matt Gaetz. The event has a 1920s-theme and will feature live music, an open bar, and great food, all at a beautiful estate.
We are selling tickets for the event at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Gaetz](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/C3Vd7XY6eKGj5m763jVehstw/o6liyTUa6RLy7YfL43C5tQ).
However, we are also having a contest to fly one supporter in to attend the event. We'll cover airfare, transportation, and a hotel.
To have a chance to be selected, all you need to do is sign up for a recurring monthly donation of $5 or more on our website at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/9lqcd763ft2msXr2XmctTdpg/o6liyTUa6RLy7YfL43C5tQ). Enter a donation amount and click the "make this montly" option.
For every $5 you pledge in your monthly donation, you will get one entry into the contest. For example, a monthly donation of $20 will get you four entries. On June 1st we will have a randomized drawing to determine who wins.
If you're already signed up for a monthly donation, don't worry -- you're already included in the drawing.
Please sign up for your monthly contribution before June 1 to have a chance to be selected.
Thanks for all your support.

Joe Kent
PS - I want to fly you out to attend our gala with Matt Gaetz on July 1st. To have a chance to win this contest, sign up for a monthly donation at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/AedrOHJSN7639kT9egZCZkEQ/o6liyTUa6RLy7YfL43C5tQ). You can also purchase a ticket outright at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Gaetz](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/C3Vd7XY6eKGj5m763jVehstw/o6liyTUa6RLy7YfL43C5tQ).

Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
---

To unsubscribe, click https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/o6liyTUa6RLy7YfL43C5tQ.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Reminder: Organizing a union means transforming lives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Happy May Day,
Peter! 🌹

On International Workers’ Day, it’s a great reminder that unions are:

1. Growing. Last year, 16 million workers became union members – an
increase of 273,000 from 2021 to 2022.
2. Popular. Labor union approval is at the highest point it's been since
1965 with 71 percent of Americans in favor of unions.
3. Necessary. Corporations are raking in record profits while workers’
wages stay stagnant and work conditions are substandard. Transforming
workers’ lives through livable wages and safe working conditions
depends on building worker power.

Unions put power back into the hands of workers, and every worker deserves
a union. This May Day, we want to share a critical resource that can help
you or someone you know, organize your workplace.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113938?t=1001&akid=28751%2E1203867%2EP6gfTe ]Check out the AFL-CIO’s guide on how to form a union – click here to
learn more about organizing your workplace.

We’re in a new era for worker power and the more workers organize, the
more we win.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134246?refcode=em20230501-28751&t=1002&akid=28751%2E1203867%2EP6gfTe ]PS: We’re committed to electing pro-labor progressives to Congress.
Will you chip in right now to support our work?

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=28751%2E1203867%2EP6gfTe ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1004&akid=28751%2E1203867%2EP6gfTe ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230501-28751-footer&t=1005&refcode2=28751_1203867_P6gfTe&akid=28751%2E1203867%2EP6gfTe

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=28751%2E1203867%2EP6gfTe

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Hey Derek, We wanted to share a sincere thank you to every member of this grassroots team for supporting the DNC. Every dollar contributed helps elect Democrats up and down the ballot, ensuring a brighter future for all Americans. _Thank you, Derek._ With President Biden and Vice President Harris running for reelection, Democrats nationwide are counting on this team’s continued support to win races from local office to the Oval Office. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.
